title: Devops & Responsibilities Hiring 2026
education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
description: This remote DevOps Lead role offers an opportunity to shape cloud architecture and deployment strategies for enterprise DevSecOps platforms. Ideal for experienced engineers with 5+ years in Kubernetes, Terraform, and multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP), seeking to pioneer new concepts and contribute to cutting-edge solutions. Leverage your expertise in CI/CD, automation, and infrastructure management in a dynamic global team
jobDescription:
Career Opportunity: Devops lead at

This remote DevOps Lead role offers an opportunity to shape cloud architecture and deployment strategies for enterprise DevSecOps platforms. Ideal for experienced engineers with 5+ years in Kubernetes, Terraform, and multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP), seeking to pioneer new concepts and contribute to cutting-edge solutions. Leverage your expertise in CI/CD, automation, and infrastructure management in a dynamic global team.

Key Highlights & Job Details

Key Skills Required

  • CI/CD
  • Linux
  • Windows
  • Ansible
  • Terraform
  • AWS
  • Azure
  • Docker
  • Google Cloud
  • Jenkins
  • Kubernetes
  • GitHub
  • GitLab
  • Git
  • Helm
  • Groovy
  • Go
  • Bash
  • Python
  • EKS
  • AKS
  • DNS
  • VPN
  • VPC
  • Load Balancers
  • Proxies
  • Prometheus
  • Grafana
  • ELK
  • Datadog
  • Cloudwatch
  • CloudTrail
  • MongoDB
  • PostgreSQL

Roles & Responsibilities

  • Work alongside ambitious and driven engineers globally to solve challenges in the DevOps space and pioneer new concepts.
  • Contribute to fast-paced cycles of innovation and development using industry-leading tools.
  • Play a pivotal role in shaping the architecture and deployment strategies of cloud-based applications.
  • Manage infrastructure for enterprise DevSecOps platforms.
  • Responsible for configuration, optimization, documentation, and support of infrastructure components as part of the IT Cloud Operations team.
  • Design, build and deliver cloud computing solutions, hosted services, and underlying software infrastructure.
  • Foster collaboration with software product development, architecture, and IT teams for repeatable and audit-able releases.
  • Support and troubleshoot scalability, high availability, performance, monitoring, backup and restores of different environments.
  • Assist in the design and implementation for modernization of tenant applications into cloud environments like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
  • Ensure overall system's reliability, stability, and scalability through rigorous testing and operational support.

Job Requirements & Eligibility

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • 5+ years of experience in DevOps.
  • Experience managing and building/setting up cloud computing platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure).
  • Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically and analytically.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work effectively within a team.
  • 4-6 years of experience in managing cloud-based services.
  • 2-4 years experience with a GIT based Source control system (GitHub/Gitlab).
  • 2-4 years experience with CI/CD technologies and tools (Jenkins, Gitlab or similar).
  • 3-6 years experience with config/provisioning tools (Ansible, Terraform, Helm).
  • 2-4 years experience in managing systems in Linux & Windows ecosystem, containers deployed as docker on Kubernetes/EKS/AKS.
  • Experience with automation via scripting (Groovy, Go, Bash, or Python).
  • 4-6 years experience with Cloud Environment (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and networking stack (DNS, VPN, VPC, LBs, Proxies).
  • 2-4 years experience with monitoring services (Prometheus/Grafana, ELK, Datadog, Cloudwatch/CloudTrail).
  • 1-2 years working knowledge of databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL).
  • Excellent Problem-solving attitude and Collaborative team spirit in a global environment.

About

is a leading global technology and services organization known for delivering innovative solutions and cultivating a growth-oriented workforce.

Why You Should Join

This role offers an exceptional opportunity to collaborate with industry professionals on impactful projects, accelerate your skill development, and build a rewarding long-term career.

How to Apply

To apply for this role, click on the application link below to navigate to the official careers page, fill out the application form with your details, upload your resume, and submit.

Final Thoughts

Make sure to apply as soon as possible before the application window closes. Share this opportunity with your friends who might be interested.

Original Job Details / Description


Job Description

Job Role- Devop lead

Experience - 5+ years

Location - remote

Budget- Hike as per Current CTC
Function: IT Operations and Support → DevOps / Cloud

Keywords : CI - CD, Linux, Windows, Ansible, Terraform, AWS, Azure, Docker, Google Cloud, Jenkins, Kubernetes
We are seeking a dynamic and driven DevOps Engineer with a wealth of experience in cloud infrastructure management, and deployment particularly in the realms of Kubernetes, Terraform across AWS, Azure and GCP. The ideal candidate should be passionate about designing and implementing cutting-edge solutions that streamline development, deployment, and operations processes. The candidate should have a cloud first and automated deployment mindset.



Responsibilities:

Work alongside ambitious and driven engineers spanning the globe who are committed to solving the hard challenges present today in the DevOps space and pioneer new concepts and capabilities around DevOps as a platform for us and our customers.
Contribute to fast-paced cycles of innovation and development, work with industry leading tools and solutions and help keep us on the forefront of the DevOps space.
Play a pivotal role in shaping the architecture and deployment strategies of our cloud-based applications, contributing to the growth and success of our technology initiatives.
Be part of a team managing infrastructure for our enterprise DevSecOps platforms.
As part of the IT Cloud Operations team, you will be responsible for configuration, optimization, documentation, and support of the infrastructure components
Design, build and deliver cloud computing solutions, hosted services, and underlying software infrastructure
Foster collaboration with software product development, architecture, and IT teams to ensure releases are delivered with repeatable and audit-able processes.
Support and troubleshoot scalability, high availability, performance, monitoring, backup and restores of different environments.
Assist in the design and implementation for modernization of our tenants applications as they are moved into cloud environments such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud
Ensure overall system's reliability, stability, and scalability through rigorous testing and operational support.


Requirements:

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Experience managing and building / setting up cloud computing platforms, such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically and analytically.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work effectively within a team.
Preferred:

4-6 years of experience in managing cloud-based services or similar
2-4 years Experience with a GIT based Source control system like GitHub/Gitlab.
2-4 years Experience with CI/CD technologies and tools like Jenkins, Gitlab or similar
3-6 years Experience with config/provisioning tools like Ansible, Terraform, Helm
2-4 years Experience in managing systems in the Linux & windows ecosystem, containers deployed as docker on Kubernetes/EKS/AKS
Experience with automation via any scripting such as Groovy, Go, Bash, or Python
4-6 years Experience with Cloud Environment in AWS or Azure or Google Cloud and their equivalent networking stack DNS, VPN, VPC, LBs, Proxies etc.
2-4 years Experience with monitoring services Prometheus/Grafana, ELK, Datadog, Cloudwatch/CloudTrail
1-2 years Working knowledge of databases like MongoDB, PostgreSQL
Excellent Problem-solving attitude and Collaborative team spirit in a global environment


If you are an experienced DevOps Engineer with a strong passion for cloud technologies, Kubernetes, and driving continuous improvement, we encourage you to apply and be a key player in shaping the future of our technology landscape. This is an opportunity to work on groundbreaking technology and contribute to the operational stability of an enterprise grade DevOps platform.

APPLY

📋 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

❓ What is the required experience for this DevOps Lead role?

The role requires 5+ years of experience in DevOps, with preferred experience in specific cloud services ranging from 1-6 years.

❓ Is this a remote position?

Yes, the job location is remote.

❓ What cloud platforms are central to this role?

The role heavily focuses on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud (GCP).

❓ What kind of salary can I expect?

The budget is a hike as per your current CTC (Cost to Company).

jobDescription:
CG Vyapam Data Entry Operator Admit Card 2026

Advertisement

The Chhattisgarh Karmachari Chayan Mandal (CG Vyapam), Raipur, has issued the official notice regarding the admit card for the Data Entry Operator (HDEO26) First Phase Written Recruitment Examination under the Chhattisgarh High Court, Bilaspur. This article explains the confirmed download date, exam schedule, and all entry-related instructions exactly as stated in the official notice.

As per the official circular (Kramank/SSB/Pariksha F-20/2026/2513, dated 16-06-2026), candidates can download their CG Vyapam Data Entry Operator admit card from 22 June 2026 onward by logging into their profile on the , vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in. The written examination will be held on 28 June 2026 (Sunday) from 10:00 AM to 12:15 PM across exam centres in 2 districts.

Download Here: CG Vyapam DEO Admit Card 2026

CG Vyapam DEO Admit Card 2026 - Key Details

This table summarizes the essential information from the official notice so candidates can quickly check the exam date, download date, and other details.

Particulars Details
Conducting Body Chhattisgarh Karmachari Chayan Mandal (CG Vyapam), Raipur
Recruiting Authority Chhattisgarh High Court, Bilaspur
Exam Name Data Entry Operator (HDEO26)
Notice Number Kramank/SSB/Pariksha F-20/2026/2513
Notice Date 16 June 2026
Admit Card Download Date 22 June 2026
Exam Date 28 June 2026 (Sunday)
Exam Time 10:00 AM to 12:15 PM
Number of Exam Districts 2
vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in

CG Vyapam DEO Admit Card 2026 - When and Where to Download

Candidates can download the CG Vyapam Data Entry Operator admit card starting 22 June 2026 through their profile login page on vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in. The notice specifically directs candidates to log in using their profile credentials and download the admit card from the link provided on the website, rather than waiting for it to be sent by post or any other means.

How to Download the CG Vyapam DEO Admit Card 2026

This section provides the step-by-step process for downloading the hall ticket as per the official instructions.

  1. Visit the : vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in.
  2. Log in to your candidate profile using your registered credentials.
  3. Locate the Data Entry Operator (HDEO26) admit card download .
  4. Click on the link to view and download your admit card.
  5. Print the complete admit card on one side of the page only, since each page must be submitted at the exam centre.
  6. Verify your name, photo, exam centre, date, and timing carefully before printing.

Important Instructions for Exam Day

This section lists the mandatory guidelines issued by CG Vyapam for candidates appearing in the HDEO26 written exam, directly from the official circular.

  • Candidates must reach their exam centre at least 2 hours before the exam start time, as biometric identification and frisking will be conducted before entry.
  • It is the candidate's responsibility to be familiar with the exact location of their exam centre one day in advance.
  • No candidate will be allowed entry to the centre after the reporting/entry deadline, regardless of the reason.
  • The admit card must be printed in full and submitted at the centre; entry will not be permitted without it.
  • Candidates cannot enter the exam centre without their printed admit card. It will not be sent by post; only the online download option is available.

Documents and Entry Rules for the CG Vyapam DEO Exam 2026

This section covers the identification requirements and entry-gate rules candidates must follow on exam day.

  • Carry a valid original photo ID proof such as Voter ID, Driving Licence, PAN Card, or Aadhaar Card matching the photo submitted during application; without this, entry will not be permitted.
  • The main gate will close 30 minutes before the exam start time since the exam begins at 10:00 AM, the gate will close at 9:30 AM.
  • Candidates must be present inside the exam centre at least 2 hours before the exam starts for identification and frisking.
  • Light-coloured, simple clothing is recommended; clothes in black, dark blue, dark green, jamuni (purple), maroon, beige, and chocolate-brown shades are not allowed.
  • Footwear such as slippers/sandals must be removed before entering.
  • Wearing any kind of jewellery is prohibited inside the exam centre.
  • Candidates will not be allowed to leave the exam hall during the first and last 30 minutes of the exam.

title: Bank of Baroda Professionals Online Form 2026 Recruitment 2026
description: Bank of Baroda has invited online applications for 65 vacancies across 12 contractual positions - Vice President, Deputy Vice President, and Assistant Vice President grades - in it
jobDescription:
Bank of Baroda has invited online applications for 65 vacancies across 12 contractual positions - Vice President, Deputy Vice President, and Assistant Vice President grades - in its Corporate and Institutional Credit (C&IC) Department. Online registration began on 16 June 2026, and the last date to submit the application and pay the fee is 06 July These are fixed-term engagements open to graduates with relevant banking, NBFC, or financial institution experience who are willing to serve anywhere in India.

Bank of Baroda Professionals Recruitment 2026 Notification Out

Advertisement

Bank of Baroda has officially released its recruitment notification (Advertisement No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/11) on 16 June 2026, announcing 65 vacancies across 12 contractual positions in the Corporate and Institutional Credit Department. The notification covers Vice President, Deputy Vice President, and Assistant Vice President level roles, with the online application window open from 16 June 2026 to 06 July Candidates are advised to check the bank's regularly, since any revision, corrigendum, or modification to the notification will be hosted there only.

  • Download Bank of Baroda Professionals Recruitment 2026 PDF

Bank of Baroda Professionals Recruitment 2026 - Overview

Particulars Details
Recruiting Organisation Bank of Baroda
Advertisement No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/11

Bank of Baroda Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

Event Date

Cut-off Date for Eligibility (Age & Qualification) 01 June 2026

Bank of Baroda Recruitment 2026 - Position-Wise Vacancy Details

Bank of Baroda has notified 65 vacancies spread across 12 distinct positions, all within the Corporate and Institutional Credit Department. The largest share goes to the AVP II-Relationship Manager post, which alone accounts for 30 vacancies covering the Credit Lite, Conglomerate, MNC, Corporate Banking, and Real Estate segments. The AVP I-Credit Lite/MNC/Real Estate/Conglomerate post carries 7 vacancies, while the DVP-Senior Relationship Manager post has 12 vacancies. The three Vice President posts and the two Deputy Vice President head-of-unit posts each carry a single vacancy.

12 AVP I - Credit Lite/MNC/Real Estate/Conglomerate 7
Total 65

Category-Wise Reservation of Vacancies

Category-wise reservation has been notified for only one social category in this drive. Out of the 65 total vacancies, 8 are reserved for the OBC category and the remaining 57 are unreserved (UR); no vacancies are reserved for SC, ST, or EWS candidates. The OBC reservation is concentrated in three posts - 1 vacancy each in the AVP II-Senior Product Sales Manager and AVP I-Product Sales Manager posts, and 6 vacancies in the AVP II-Relationship Manager post. The bank has also clarified that the number of vacancies shown, including the reserved ones, is provisional and may change based on its actual requirement.

Position OBC UR Total
VP - Relationship Head, Real Estate 0 1 1

DVP - Senior Relationship Manager 0 12 12

AVP II - SPSM, Transaction Banking 1 1 2
AVP II - Relationship Manager 6 24 30

Grand Total 8 57 65

Eligibility Criteria: Age Limit and Qualification

Eligibility for every post is assessed as on 01 June 2026, the cut-off date fixed by the bank, and depends on a candidate's age, educational qualification, and post-qualification work experience in banks, financial institutions, or NBFCs. Age limits rise with seniority - from 28-38 years for the entry-level AVP I posts up to 36-52 years for the Vice President posts - and the maximum age shown applies to General category candidates.

Age relaxation is available to specific categories, though the bank has specified that it applies only to posts where reservation roster points exist. Since OBC is the only category with roster points in this recruitment (in the AVP II-SPSM, AVP II-Relationship Manager, and AVP I-PSM posts), the 3-year OBC relaxation is the one most likely to apply in practice. There is also no reservation for Ex-servicemen in the Officers' Cadre for this recruitment.

Category Age Relaxation
SC/ST 5 years
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years
PWD (General/EWS) 10 years
PWD (OBC) 13 years
PWD (SC/ST) 15 years
Ex-servicemen (General/EWS) 5 years
Ex-servicemen (OBC) 8 years
Ex-servicemen (SC/ST) 10 years

Every post requires at least a graduation in any discipline, mostly paired with a postgraduate management or finance qualification, a chartered accountancy, or an equivalent professional certification. Experience requirements range from a minimum of 5 years for the AVP I grade up to a minimum of 15 years for the Vice President posts, with a defined number of those years required specifically in the relevant function.

Position(s) Age (Years) Essential Qualification Experience Required
VP - Relationship Head (Real Estate / MNCs / Credit Lite Clients) - 3 posts, 1 vacancy each 36-52 Graduation (any discipline) + MBA/PGDM (min. 1-yr course) OR CA. Preferred: MBA/PGDM from Tier-1 institutes or CA in first attempt Min. 15 years in Public/Private/Foreign Banks/FIs, incl. min. 8 years in Sales/Relationship Management in Corporate Credit
DVP - Head, Market Intelligence Unit 32-45 Graduation + Two-Year Full-Time MBA/PGDM in Finance Min. 12 years in Banks/FIs/NBFCs, incl. min. 5 years in Business MIS/strategy/planning team or similar
DVP - Head, Product Sales (Transaction Banking) 32-45 Graduation + Two-Year Full-Time MBA/PGDM in Finance Min. 12 years in Banks/FIs/NBFCs, incl. min. 5 years in Transaction Banking/Trade Finance/CMS
DVP - Senior Relationship Manager 32-45 Graduation + PG Degree/Diploma with Finance specialisation (min. 1-yr course). Preferred: CA/CMA/CFA/MBA/PGDM Min. 12 years in Public/Private/Foreign Banks/FIs, incl. min. 5 years in Sales/Relationship Management in Corporate Banking
AVP II - Conglomerate/Real Estate 30-40 Graduation + PG Degree/Diploma (min. 1 yr) OR CA/CMA/CFA Min. 8 years in Banks, incl. min. 5 years in Large/Mid Corporate Credit dealing with corporate clients
AVP II - Product Manager, Corporate Banking 30-40 Graduation + Two-Year Full-Time MBA/PGDM in Finance OR CA/CMA/CFA Min. 8 years in Banks/FIs/NBFCs, incl. min. 3 years in product team
AVP II - SPSM, Transaction Banking 30-40 Graduation + PG Degree/Diploma with Finance specialisation (min. 1 yr) Min. 8 years in Banks/FIs/NBFCs, incl. min. 4 years in Transaction Banking Sales/Trade Finance/CMS sales
AVP II - Relationship Manager 30-40 Graduation + PG Degree/Diploma (min. 1 yr). Preferred: CA/CMA/CFA/MBA/PGDM Min. 8 years in Public/Private/Foreign Banks/FIs, incl. min. 3 years in Corporate Banking Sales/Relationship Management
AVP I - PSM, Transaction Banking 28-38 Graduation (any discipline). Preferred: CA/CMA/CFA/MBA/PGDM Min. 5 years in Banks/FIs/NBFCs, incl. min. 2 years in Transaction Banking Sales/Trade Finance/CMS sales
AVP I - Credit Lite/MNC/Real Estate/Conglomerate 28-38 Graduation + PG Degree/Diploma (min. 1 yr) OR CA/CMA/CFA Min. 5 years in Public/Private/Foreign Banks/FIs, incl. min. 3 years in Large/Mid Corporate Credit dealing with corporate clients

A few additional conditions apply across all posts. Educational qualifications must be from an institution recognised by the Government of India, a government body, or the AICTE. Experience gained in the clerical cadre is not counted towards eligibility, and any single stint of post-qualification work experience shorter than six months (as on the cut-off date) will also not be counted. Only one application is allowed per candidate; if multiple applications are submitted, only the latest valid one will be retained and the fee paid for any other registration will be forfeited. Bank of Baroda has also stated that only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India should apply, since posting will depend entirely on the bank's requirement at any of its offices or branches across the country.

On citizenship, a candidate must be an Indian citizen, or a subject of Nepal or Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1 January 1962 intending to settle permanently, or a person of Indian origin who migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, or specified East African countries with the same intention - though candidates in these latter categories must hold a certificate of eligibility issued by the Government of India.

Note: Eligible candidates should have the required post-qualification experience (e.g., 5+ years for AVP I or 15+ years for VP roles) in banks/NBFCs/financial institutions, be willing to work anywhere in India, and maintain a clean credit history (CIBIL 680+ with no defaults). Candidates should not apply if they don’t meet the age/experience criteria as on 01 June 2026, have only clerical or very short (<6 months) relevant experience, or are not open to posting anywhere in India.

Also Read: Indian Air Force (IAF) Intake 02/2027 Recruitment 2026 Notification Out

Bank of Baroda Professionals Recruitment 2026 -

Applications for this recruitment can be submitted only through the online mode on Bank of Baroda's - no offline or postal applications are accepted. The application window is open from 16 June 2026 to 06 July 2026, and registration is complete only once the application fee is successfully paid through the online payment gateway. Candidates can access the application form directly at www.bankofbaroda.bank.in/Career.htm, under the Career section's "Current Opportunities" page on www.bankofbaroda.bank.in.

  • Direct Link to apply Bank of Baroda Professionals Recruitment 2026

Key Roles and Responsibilities

A few common themes run across most of these positions. The Vice President and Deputy Vice President-level Relationship Head and Senior Relationship Manager roles centre on growing and managing the bank's existing corporate relationships in their specialised segment - real estate, MNCs, credit-lite clients, or conglomerates - sourcing new-to-bank corporate clients, cross-selling fee-based products such as forex and cash management services, and building account plans with opportunity-income analysis while keeping risk exposure within the bank's Exposure Risk Framework. The Transaction Banking roles (Head-Product Sales, Senior Product Sales Manager, and Product Sales Manager) focus on selling trade, forex, and cash management products, managing transaction banking client relationships, and driving fee income and CASA balances. The AVP-level Conglomerate/Real Estate and Credit Lite roles concentrate on credit appraisal, risk evaluation, and timely account monitoring, while the DVP-Head Market Intelligence Unit role is centred on gathering and summarising market and industry intelligence to provide competitive insights to management. Across all positions, the bank has reserved the right to modify or add to these responsibilities at any time.

Application Fee

Bank of Baroda has set a two-tier, non-refundable application fee for this recruitment. Unreserved (UR), EWS, and OBC candidates must pay Rs 850 (inclusive of GST), plus applicable payment gateway charges, while SC, ST, PWD, Ex-servicemen/DESM, and Women candidates pay Rs 175 (inclusive of GST), plus payment gateway charges. The fee can be paid online using a Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, or UPI. It is payable irrespective of whether an online test is eventually conducted and irrespective of whether the candidate is shortlisted for an interview, and once paid, it will not be refunded under any circumstances.

In-Hand Salary Calculator 2026

Contract Tenure, Remuneration and Credit Score Requirement

These are fixed-term contractual roles, and the tenure depends on the grade. For AVP I and AVP II, the initial contract runs for 5 years from the date of joining and can be renewed at the bank's discretion, subject to satisfactory performance, for one additional period of up to 5 years. For VP and DVP, the initial contract is for 3 years and can be extended in increments of 1 year each, provided the total engagement does not exceed 5 years. In every case, the engagement automatically ends at contract expiry unless renewed, and it cannot continue beyond the candidate reaching 60 years of age.

Remuneration is not fixed in the notification - the bank states it will be decided based on the selected candidate's qualifications, experience, overall suitability, last drawn salary, and the prevailing market benchmark for the position, and the place of posting will depend on the bank's requirement at any of its offices or branches in India.

A distinctive eligibility condition for this recruitment is credit history: candidates must have a CIBIL score of 680 or above at the time of joining, and the bank has explicitly stated that candidates who have defaulted on loan or credit card repayments, or against whom adverse reports exist with CIBIL or other credit-rating agencies, will be deemed ineligible for appointment - a check the bank can apply at any stage, including after joining.

Selection Process

Selection proceeds through Application Scrutiny, followed by an Online Test, Psychometric Test, or any other test the bank considers suitable, and then a Personal Interview along with compensation negotiation for those selected. The Psychometric Test and/or Interview assess a candidate's personality, communication, clarity, problem-solving ability, efficiency, and willingness to work anywhere in the country. To qualify in the Personal Interview, a candidate must score at least 60% for the Unreserved category and 55% for Reserved category candidates, though the bank reserves the right to revise this cut-off. If multiple candidates tie at the cut-off mark, they are ranked in descending order of age, meaning the older candidate ranks higher.

Call letters will be sent only to the email ID registered in the online application - no hard copies will be sent by post or courier - so candidates must keep that email account active and check it regularly. At the interview, candidates must carry a valid photo ID such as a PAN card, passport, driving licence, voter's card, or Aadhaar card with photograph; a Ration Card will not be accepted as identity proof for this recruitment, and candidates who have legally changed their name must produce the original Gazette notification or affidavit reflecting the new name.

How to Apply: Step-by-Step Guide

  1. Visit the Bank of Baroda website www.bankofbaroda.bank.in (or directly www.bankofbaroda.bank.in/Career.htm) and go to the Career section's "Current Opportunities" page.
  2. Register using a valid personal email ID and contact number that you can keep active throughout the recruitment process, since all call letters and updates will be sent there.
  3. Fill in the online application form carefully - no field can be edited once you click Submit - and ensure your name is spelt exactly as it appears on your certificates and mark sheets.
  4. Upload your bio-data, scanned photograph (200×230 pixels, 20-50 KB), and signature (140×60 pixels, 10-20 KB) in JPG/JPEG format, along with PDF copies of your eligibility documents.
  5. Pay the applicable application fee online using a Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, or UPI through the integrated payment gateway.
  6. After successful payment, download and print the system-generated e-receipt and application form for your records; if a transaction fails, register again and make the payment afresh rather than assuming the first attempt succeeded.
  7. Complete the process well before 06 July 2026, since the bank has advised against waiting until the last date to avoid login failures caused by heavy website traffic.

Documents Required (Upload and Interview)

Two separate sets of documents matter here - what must be uploaded with the online application, and what must be physically produced at the interview.

Documents to upload (PDF format, A4 page size, file size not exceeding 500 KB each):

  • Resume
  • Date of Birth proof (10th mark sheet/certificate)
  • Educational certificates (all relevant mark sheets and certificates scanned into a single PDF)
  • Work experience certificates, if applicable
  • Caste/Category certificate, if applicable
  • PWD certificate, if applicable

Documents to carry to the interview (originals plus a self-attested photocopy):

  • Printout of the valid interview call letter and the system-generated online application form
  • Proof of date of birth (birth certificate or SSLC/Class X mark sheet showing DOB)
  • Photo ID proof (PAN, passport, driving licence, voter's card, or Aadhaar with photograph - a Ration Card is not accepted)
  • Semester/year-wise mark sheets and the final degree/diploma certificate
  • Caste certificate in the prescribed Government of India format for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates (the OBC certificate must include the non-creamy-layer clause and be issued within one year of the date of advertisement)
  • Disability certificate from the District Medical Board for PWD candidates, along with scribe details if a scribe was used
  • Discharge book, pension payment order, and rank proof for Ex-servicemen candidates
  • A No Objection Certificate from the current employer for candidates serving in Government, Quasi-Government, or Public Sector roles, including nationalised banks
  • Certificate of eligibility from the Government of India for candidates from Nepal, Bhutan, the Tibetan-refugee category, or the specified person-of-Indian-origin categories
  • Proof of work experience such as appointment letters, salary slips, relieving letters, and CTC break-up documents

Bank of Baroda has also appended ready-to-use certificate formats for SC/ST, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer), Persons with Disabilities (single and multiple disability), and EWS candidates as annexures to the notification; candidates applying under these categories should get their certificates issued in this prescribed format from the competent authority.

Also Read: BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026

Troubleshooting and Common Mistakes to Avoid

Keep your scanned photograph between 20-50 KB and your signature between 10-20 KB, both in JPG/JPEG format - files outside this range, or in the wrong format, will trigger an error and block submission. Sign only in your normal handwriting and never in capital letters, since the bank has specified that signatures in capital letters will not be accepted, and any mismatch between your call-letter signature and your interview-day signature can lead to disqualification.

If an online payment fails or you are unsure whether it went through, do not assume it succeeded - register again and complete the payment, since the fee is non-refundable. Use an updated browser and a stable internet connection while filling the form, and avoid waiting until the last day or last few hours before 06 July 2026, since heavy website traffic close to the deadline is a common cause of failed submissions. Always download and save your acknowledgement number, e-receipt, and printed application form immediately after payment, as these are needed for future reference and at the interview. Finally, double-check every field - especially your name, category, and date of birth - before clicking Submit, since no corrections are allowed after the online application has been submitted.

description: Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) has invited online applications from eligible Male and Female Indian citizens for filling up temporary posts of Para Medical Staff in Pay L
jobDescription:
Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) has invited online applications from eligible Male and Female Indian citizens for filling up temporary posts of Para Medical Staff in Pay Level-5 of 7th CPC (Rs. 29,200 – 92,300/-) through CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment All interested and eligible candidates can at the official CISF recruitment website cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in from 08 June This article highlights all major details like eligibility, selection process, application dates and more.

CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Advertisement

The detailed notification for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff posts has been released and it includes complete details like post name, vacancy number, application dates, education and age limit and other details. Before applying for these posts, candidates must cross-check all the details to avoid any type of disqualification from the application form. For the ease of the candidates, we have provided the direct download link of the notification PDF in the article below.

  • Download CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

CISF Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026

This is a great opportunity for all eligible para-medical candidates who want to make a career in the Central Armed Police Forces. They can apply for these posts through CISF Recruitment 2026 on the at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in. After applying, the selection of candidates will be based on various stages such as Written Examination (OMR/CBT), Physical Standard Test (PST), Documentation, Basic Vocational Aptitude Test (BVAT) and Medical Examination.

CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026: Key Highlights
Recruiting Body Central Industrial Security Force (CISF)
Posts ASI (Pharmacist) / ASI (X-Ray Technician) / ASI (Lab Technician)
Online Application Start Date 08 June 2026
Online Application Last Date 07 July 2026 (upto 2359 Hrs)
Total Vacancies 24
Pay Scale Pay Level-5, 7th CPC (Rs. 29,200 – 92,300/-)
Selection Process Written Exam (OMR/CBT) – PST – Documentation – BVAT – Medical Examination
https://cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in

How Many Vacancies Announced for CISF ASI Posts?

A total of 24 posts for ASI Para Medical Staff have been announced on all India basis. Through the given table, candidates can check the category-wise vacancies for ASI (Pharmacist), ASI (X-Ray Technician) and ASI (Lab Technician) posts.

CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Vacancy 2026
Post Name UR EWS OBC SC ST Total
ASI (Pharmacist) 10 01 04 02 01 18
ASI (X-Ray Technician) 01 00 00 00 00 01
ASI (Lab Technician) 04 00 01 00 00 05
Total 15 01 05 02 01 24

ASI (Pharmacist) has the highest number of vacancies among all posts. Additionally, 02 vacancies are reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) against ASI (Pharmacist). The number of vacancies given above are tentative and may change at any time/stage of recruitment.

Also Read: Bank of Baroda Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 5000 Posts

What are the Apply Dates 2026?

Here, for the ease of the candidates, we have provided all important dates for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 like online application start date, closing date and more.

Event Date
Online Application Start Date 08 June 2026
Online Application Last Date 07 July 2026 (upto 2359 Hrs)
Last Date for Fee Payment (SBI Challan) 09 July 2026 (upto 2359 Hrs)
Age Cut-Off Date 07 July 2026

What are the Eligibility Criteria?

The recruitment notification includes vacancies for three para-medical posts. Candidates must fulfil the prescribed educational qualifications and age criteria to be eligible. The required qualifications vary according to the post applied for.

Educational Qualification

Candidates applying for ASI (Pharmacist) must have:

  • Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University.
  • Diploma or Degree in Pharmacy granted by an institution recognized by the Central or State Government.
  • Should be registered as a "PHARMACIST" under the Pharmacy Act, 1948.

Candidates applying for ASI (X-Ray Technician) must have:

  • Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University.
  • 02 years Diploma in Radiography from an institution recognized by Central or State Government.

Candidates applying for ASI (Lab Technician) must have:

  • Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University with Science.
  • 02 years Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology from an institution recognized by any Central or State Government.

Age Limit

The age limit is the same for all three posts. Age will be calculated as on the closing date of online application i.e. 07 July Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates is applicable as per Government orders.

Post Name Minimum Age Maximum Age
ASI (Pharmacist) 18 Years 28 Years
ASI (X-Ray Technician) 18 Years 28 Years
ASI (Lab Technician) 18 Years 28 Years

CISF ASI 2026

The online application link for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 will be activated on 08 June 2026 on the official CISF recruitment portal at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in. Eligible candidates must complete their One-Time Registration before filling the online application form. No other mode of submission of application is allowed. For the ease of the candidates, we have provided the direct online application link in the article below.

Link for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026

CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Application Fee 2026

To for CISF ASI posts, candidates from UR, EWS and OBC categories will have to pay the application fee. Female candidates and candidates belonging to SC/ST/ESM categories are exempted from payment of fee.

Category Application Fee
UR / EWS / OBC Rs. 100/-
SC / ST / ESM / Female Candidates Nil (Exempted)

How To For CISF ASI Posts?

Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application form.

  • Visit the official CISF recruitment website at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in.
  • Click on the "NEW REGISTRATION" button and complete the One-Time Registration process using your Mobile Number and Email ID.
  • Login using your Registration ID and auto-generated password and click on "Recruitment of Paramedical Staff in CISF – 2026" tab.
  • Fill in the essential details such as Registration ID, Password and Captcha and click "SUBMIT".
  • Fill the required personal and educational details in the online application form.
  • Upload your recent passport size photograph (not more than 3 months old), signature, Date of Birth Certificate and educational qualification certificate as per specified format.
  • Pay the application fee through UPI, Net Banking, Credit/Debit card or SBI Challan (cash at SBI branches).
  • Review all the details carefully, click "Final Submission" and take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

Selection Process (Written Exam, PST, BVAT & Medical)

The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Selection Process 2026 consists of multiple stages. Candidates must qualify at each stage to proceed to the next round. The final select list will be drawn based on aggregate marks obtained in the Written Examination (OMR/CBT) equal to the vacancies notified.

  • Written Examination (OMR/CBT Mode – Objective Type)
  • Physical Standard Test (PST) & Documentation
  • Basic Vocational Aptitude Test (BVAT)
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME)

Also Read: NCL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 for 1607 Graduate, Diploma, Trade Apprentice Posts

CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Exam Pattern 2026

The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Exam 2026 is conducted in multiple stages. The Written Examination is objective in nature and conducted in OMR/CBT mode. Candidates who qualify the written exam are shortlisted for PST, Documentation, BVAT and Medical Examination at a ratio of about 5 (five) times the number of vacancies notified.

Written Examination (OMR/CBT)

  • Objective Multiple Choice type written examination.
  • Total Marks: 100
  • Duration: 2 Hours
  • Questions are asked to test knowledge in the respective trade.
  • Conducted in English and Hindi (bilingual).
  • There is no negative marking.
  • Candidates are shortlisted for PST based on their performance in the Written Examination.

Physical Standard Test (PST)

title: IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027 Recruitment 2026: , Salary ₹30,000–₹40,000/Month + Seva Nidhi
description: IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027: A Dream Chance to Join the Indian Air Force Calling all young aspirants who dream of wearing the Air Force uniform! The Indian Air Force (IAF) has
jobDescription:
IAF Agniveer Vayu Intake 02/2027: A Dream Chance to Join the Indian Air Force

Calling all young aspirants who dream of wearing the Air Force uniform! The Indian Air Force (IAF) has opened registration for Agniveervayu Intake 02/2027 under the Agnipath Scheme. This is one of the most popular defence recruitment drives in the country, open to unmarried young men and women who have passed 10+You get to serve the nation, earn a respectable salary, and build discipline and skills for life.

Online registration is open from 6 July 2026 to 26 July 2026. The Agniveervayu serve for four years and receive an attractive monthly package along with a Seva Nidhi corpus on exit. This guide explains everything in very simple words — eligibility, age, salary, physical standards, selection and how to . Read it fully and keep visiting so you never miss an Air Force update.

Key Highlights — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

Here is a quick overview of this Air Force recruitment so you can check the basics at a glance before reading the full details below.

  • Organisation: Indian Air Force (IAF) — Agnipath Scheme
  • Post Name: Agniveervayu (Intake 02/2027)
  • Eligibility: 10+2 / Intermediate pass (Science or any stream)
  • Salary: ₹30,000 to ₹40,000 per month + Seva Nidhi package
  • Job Location: All India
  • Registration Dates: 6 July to 26 July 2026

Vacancy Details — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

The Indian Air Force does not announce a fixed total number for Agniveervayu posts. Vacancies are allocated state-wise and the final intake is decided as per the service requirement, with female candidate intake decided separately. Because the numbers are not capped category-wise, every eligible candidate who scores well in the online test has a fair chance based on state-wise merit.

Eligibility Criteria — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

There are two broad streams of eligibility. Check the one that matches your 10+2 subjects before applying. The minimum marks rule is strict, so confirm your percentage carefully.

Educational Qualification

Candidates with a 3-year Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Automobile, Computer Science, IT or Instrumentation) are also eligible under the Science stream. Students who completed their schooling and want a 12th-pass government job should read the subject rules in the notification carefully.

Age Limit

Candidates born between 01 July 2005 and 01 January 2010 (both dates inclusive) are eligible. If selected, the upper age at the time of enrolment must not exceed 22 years. Only unmarried candidates can apply, and they must not marry during the four-year engagement period.

Physical & Medical Standards — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

Physical fitness is a key part of Air Force selection. Make sure you meet these basic standards before applying.

  • Height: Minimum 152 cm (with regional relaxations for North-East, hilly areas and Lakshadweep)
  • Chest: Minimum 77 cm with at least 5 cm expansion (male)
  • Hearing & Vision: Normal hearing and prescribed visual standards; no LASIK/PRK history
  • Medical: Final fitness decided by the Air Force Medical Board

What Is the Salary for IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027?

The Agniveervayu earn a customised monthly package that increases each year, plus a lump-sum Seva Nidhi at the end of four years. This is a major attraction of the Agnipath scheme.

In the first year, the in-hand amount is about ₹21,000 per month. On completing four years, an Agniveer receives a Seva Nidhi package of approximately ₹10.04 lakh (including the government’s matching contribution). A non-contributory life insurance cover of ₹48 lakh is also provided during the engagement.

What Is the Selection Process for IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027?

The selection happens in three phases. Knowing each stage helps you prepare in the right way; you can also check general exam syllabus and pattern guidance.

  1. Phase-I — Online Test (STAR): an objective test as per the chosen stream, with +1 for a correct answer and -0.25 for a wrong answer.
  2. Phase-II — Physical Fitness Test (PFT), Adaptability Tests and document verification at the Airmen Selection Centre.
  3. Phase-III — Medical Examination by the Air Force Medical Team.

Final selection is made through a state-wise Provisional Select List based on merit, subject to medical fitness and vacancy availability.

How to for IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027?

The application is fully online. Follow these steps carefully and apply before the last date — there is no extension.

  1. Visit the official Air Force recruitment portal (link available in Essential Links below).
  2. Complete the registration with your personal details and verify the OTPs sent to your mobile and email.
  3. Fill the application form and upload your photograph, signature and thumb impression in the prescribed sizes.
  4. Choose your five preferred exam-city options for the online test.
  5. Pay the examination fee online and submit; print a copy of the final application form.

Important Dates — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

Mark these dates clearly. The registration window closes at 2300 hours on the last date with no extension.

Application Fee — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

A single examination fee applies to all candidates, paid online. The fee is non-refundable, so apply only after confirming your eligibility.

Payment can be made online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI. The application is submitted automatically once payment is successful.

Essential Links — IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027

  • Page
  • for IAF Agniveer Vayu 02/2027
  • Visit IAF Official Recruitment Website

The Agniveervayu Intake 02/2027 is a fantastic chance to serve the nation in the Indian Air Force while earning well and gaining lifelong discipline. If you are an unmarried 10+2 pass candidate in the right age group, prepare for the online test and apply between 6 and 26 July For more defence and Air Force job updates, keep visiting every single day.

title: IAF Airmen Group Y Intake 02/2027 Recruitment: for Medical Assistant Trade, Pay ₹14,600–₹26,900/Month
description: IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Intake 02/2027: A Stable Career in the Air Force Here is a special opportunity for science students who want a long-term career in uniform! The
jobDescription:
IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Intake 02/2027: A Stable Career in the Air Force

Here is a special opportunity for science students who want a long-term career in uniform! The Indian Air Force (IAF) has opened registration for Airmen in Group ‘Y’ (Non-Technical) Medical Assistant Trade, Intake 02/Importantly, this is a regular Air Force enrolment with a 20-year tenure — it is not an Agniveer or short-term post. That makes it one of the most secure defence jobs available this year, with full pay, allowances and long service benefits.

Online registration runs from 6 July 2026 to 26 July 2026. The trade is open to unmarried candidates who have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English, as well as pharmacy diploma/degree holders. This guide explains everything in simple words — eligibility tracks, age, pay, selection and how to . Read it carefully and keep visiting for every Air Force update.

Key Highlights — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

Here is a quick snapshot of this recruitment. Unlike Agniveer entries, this is a permanent Airman role with a long, secure tenure.

  • Organisation: Indian Air Force (IAF)
  • Trade: Group ‘Y’ (Non-Technical) — Medical Assistant
  • Eligibility: 10+2 with PCB & English, or Pharmacy Diploma/Degree
  • Pay: ₹14,600 (training) to ₹26,900 per month + allowances
  • Tenure: 20 years (regular service, not Agniveer)
  • Registration Dates: 6 July to 26 July 2026

Vacancy Details — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

The Indian Air Force has not announced a fixed total number of vacancies for this trade. Selection is made against anticipated vacancies, and separate Provisional Select Lists are prepared for the 10+2 candidates and for the Diploma/B.Pharma/B.Sc Pharmacy candidates. So eligible candidates from both tracks have a fair chance based on merit.

Eligibility Criteria — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

There are two eligibility tracks with different subject and age rules. Read the one that matches your qualification carefully before applying.

Educational Qualification

Candidates from the pharmacy track must hold valid registration from the State Pharmacy Council or Pharmacy Council of India at the time of enrolment. If you are exploring medical and healthcare government jobs, this is a strong long-term option.

Age Limit

The age rules differ by track. Only the dates of birth listed below are eligible:

  • 10+2 track (unmarried): born between 01 July 2006 and 01 July 2010
  • Pharmacy track (unmarried): born between 01 July 2003 and 01 July 2008
  • Pharmacy track (married): born between 01 July 2003 and 01 July 2006

Physical & Medical Standards — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

Physical fitness is essential for selection. Confirm that you meet these basic standards before you .

  • Height: Minimum 152 cm
  • Chest: Minimum 77 cm with at least 5 cm expansion
  • Vision: Visual acuity 6/36 each eye, correctable to 6/6; no LASIK/PRK history
  • Medical: Normal hearing, healthy teeth and gums; final fitness decided by the Medical Board

What Is the Salary for IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027?

Because this is a regular Air Force enrolment, the pay follows the normal Airman pay structure — much more than a short-term stipend. This long-term financial security is a big advantage.

  • During Training: ₹14,600 per month (stipend)
  • After Training (starting): ₹26,900 per month gross (including Military Service Pay) plus Dearness Allowance

Airmen also receive Transport Allowance, ration, free medical care, accommodation, 60 days annual leave, LTC and a Group Insurance Cover of ₹62.5 lakh. Pay rises steadily with career progression over the 20-year service.

What Is the Selection Process for IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027?

The selection runs in three phases. Knowing the structure helps you prepare in the right way; you can also review general exam syllabus and pattern guidance.

  1. Phase-I — Online Test of 45 minutes covering English and Reasoning & General Awareness, with +1 for a correct answer and -0.25 for a wrong answer.
  2. Phase-II — Physical Fitness Test (PFT), Adaptability Tests and document verification at the Airmen Selection Centre.
  3. Phase-III — Medical Examination by the Air Force Medical Team.

Final selection is based on merit through a Provisional Select List, subject to medical fitness and vacancy availability.

How to for IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027?

The application is fully online. Follow these steps and submit well before the closing time — there is no extension.

  1. Visit the official Air Force recruitment portal (link available in Essential Links below).
  2. Register with your personal details and verify the OTPs sent to your mobile and email.
  3. Fill the form and upload your photograph, signature and thumb impression in the prescribed sizes.
  4. Choose your five exam-city options and fourteen Airmen Selection Centre options in order of preference.
  5. Pay the examination fee online and submit; keep a printout of the final form.

Important Dates — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

Note these dates carefully. Registration closes at 2300 hours on the last date with no extension.

Application Fee — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

A single examination fee applies to all candidates, paid online. The fee is non-refundable, so apply only after confirming your eligibility.

Payment can be made online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI. The application submits automatically once the payment is successful.

Essential Links — IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027

  • Page
  • for IAF Airmen Group Y 02/2027
  • Visit IAF Official Recruitment Website

The IAF Airmen Group Y Medical Assistant Intake 02/2027 is a rare chance to build a stable, 20-year career in the Air Force with full pay and benefits — a big step up from short-term entries. If you are an eligible 10+2 PCB or pharmacy candidate, prepare well and apply between 6 and 26 July For more defence and Air Force notifications, keep visiting every day.

title: RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026: Apply Offline for 23 Posts in Hockey, Athletics, Football & More
description: RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026: A Great Railway Job for Sportspersons Wonderful news for talented sportspersons! Rail Coach Factory (RCF), Kapurthala — a major produc
jobDescription:
RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026: A Great Railway Job for Sportspersons

Wonderful news for talented sportspersons! Rail Coach Factory (RCF), Kapurthala — a major production unit of Indian Railways — has released Employment Notice No. 01/SPQ/2026-27 to recruit 23 sportspersons against the Sports Quota through open advertisement. If you have represented at the national or international level in games like hockey, athletics, football, cricket, wrestling or weightlifting, this is your chance to land a secure railway government job while continuing your sports journey.

The application window is open from 15 June 2026 to 14 July 2026, and applications are accepted by post only. Selected candidates get a permanent railway job in Pay Levels 1 to 5 with full government benefits. This guide explains everything in simple words — vacancies, eligibility, sports norms, pay, selection and how to . Read it fully and keep visiting for every railway update.

Key Highlights — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

Here is a quick overview of this sports-quota recruitment so you can check the basics before reading the full details below.

  • Organisation: Rail Coach Factory (RCF), Kapurthala
  • Recruitment: Against Sports Quota (Open Advertisement)
  • Total Vacancies: 23 posts
  • Pay: Pay Level 1, 2 and 4/5 (7th CPC)
  • Job Location: Kapurthala, Punjab
  • Last Date (by post): 14 July 2026

Vacancy Breakdown — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

The 23 vacancies are spread across nine sports disciplines and three pay levels, as shown below. Each slot is tied to a specific game and position.

Eligibility Criteria — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

You must meet both the education standard for the pay level and the sports achievement norms. Both are checked strictly, so confirm before applying.

Educational Qualification

Candidates who passed 10th or hold an ITI certificate can apply for the Level-1 posts. There is no relaxation in minimum qualification for open-advertisement recruitment.

Age Limit

The age limit is 18 to 25 years as on 01.07.2026. As this is an open-advertisement recruitment, no age relaxation (upper or lower) is allowed for any category.

Sports Achievement Norms

You must be an active player with achievements in the current and immediately preceding two years (from 01.04.2024). The required level depends on the pay level — for example, Level-1 needs strong National Championship or Federation Cup performance, while Level-4/5 needs Olympic, Asian Games or World Cup-level achievement.

What Is the Salary for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026?

Selected candidates get a regular railway salary as per the 7th Pay Commission, along with allowances. This is a permanent, pensionable government job.

  • Level-1: ₹18,000 (entry basic pay)
  • Level-2: ₹19,900 (entry basic pay)
  • Level-4: ₹25,500 (entry basic pay)
  • Level-5: ₹29,200 (entry basic pay)

In addition to basic pay, candidates receive Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Transport Allowance and other railway benefits. Appointees serve a 2-year probation and sign a 5-year service bond.

What Is the Selection Process for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026?

Selection is based on sports trials, not a written exam. Understanding the process helps you prepare your documents and fitness in advance.

  1. All eligible candidates are called for a Trial assessed out of 40 marks (game skill, physical fitness and coach’s observation).
  2. Only candidates declared FIT (scoring 25 or more out of 40 in the trial) move to the next stage of assessment.
  3. Final selection is purely on merit; if two candidates score equal marks, the younger candidate is preferred.

The minimum qualifying marks vary by pay level (for example, 70 marks for Level-4/5). Document verification and a medical check are part of the final stage.

How to Apply for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026?

This recruitment accepts offline (postal) applications only — there is no online application. Follow these steps carefully and post your application before the last date.

  1. Download the prescribed application form (Annexure-A) from the RCF (link available in Essential Links below).
  2. Fill the form neatly in your own handwriting and affix a clear passport-size photograph.
  3. Attach attested photocopies of your educational certificates, sports achievement certificates, date-of-birth proof and the fee payment receipt.
  4. Superscribe the envelope with “RECRUITMENT AGAINST SPORTS QUOTA FOR THE YEAR 2026-2027 IN LEVEL-01, LEVEL-02 and LEVEL-4/5”.
  5. Send the complete application by post to the General Manager (Personnel), Rail Coach Factory, Kapurthala, so that it reaches before the last date.

Important Dates — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

Note these dates carefully. Applications received after the closing time will not be entertained.

Application Fees — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

The fee is paid to the RCF account through State Bank of India, and a large part is refunded to candidates who actually appear in the trial.

The reduced ₹250 fee applies to SC, ST, Ex-Servicemen, PwD, Women, Minorities and Economically Backward Class candidates. Cheque, demand draft and postal orders are not accepted, and the fee receipt must be attached with your application.

Documents Required — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

Keep attested photocopies of these documents ready before posting your application, so it is not rejected for being incomplete.

  • 10th / 12th / ITI educational certificates and marksheets
  • Sports achievement certificates (national/international level)
  • Date-of-birth proof (Matriculation certificate)
  • Caste certificate (SC, ST, OBC or EWS), if applicable
  • Application fee payment receipt

Essential Links — RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota 2026

The RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota recruitment is a rare chance for talented sportspersons to secure a permanent railway job while continuing to play the game they love. title: CGPSC ADPP Recruitment 2026: for 15 Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer Posts, Pay Level-9
description: CGPSC ADPP Recruitment 2026: A Golden Career Chance for Law Graduates in Chhattisgarh Attention all law graduates! The Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has released A
jobDescription:
CGPSC ADPP Recruitment 2026: A Golden Career Chance for Law Graduates in Chhattisgarh

Attention all law graduates! The Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has released Advertisement No. 03/2026 to fill 15 posts of Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer (ADPP) in the Home Department. This is a Gazetted Class II government job with an attractive Pay Matrix Level-9 salary, making it one of the most respected legal openings of the year for those seeking government jobs in Chhattisgarh.

The online application process runs from 22 June 2026 to 21 July 2026. If you hold an LL.B. degree and dream of serving in the prosecution wing, this is a great opportunity with a secure career and good growth. This article explains all the details in very simple language — vacancies, eligibility, salary, exam pattern, fees and how to . Read it fully and keep visiting for every update.

Key Highlights — CGPSC ADPP 2026

Here is a quick snapshot of this recruitment so you can decide at a glance whether it suits you. The post offers a permanent, gazetted role with the State Government of Chhattisgarh.

  • Organisation: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC)
  • Post Name: Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer (Home Department)
  • Total Vacancies: 15 posts
  • Pay Scale: Pay Matrix Level-9 (₹38,100 – ₹1,20,400)
  • Job Location: Chhattisgarh
  • Last Date to Apply: 21 July 2026

Vacancy Breakdown — CGPSC ADPP 2026

The 15 vacancies (including carry-forward/backlog posts) are distributed across categories as shown below. Note that EWS is not used in this notification.

Within the total, 1 post is reserved horizontally for women and 3 posts for Persons with Disabilities (One Arm – OA category), as per Chhattisgarh rules.

Eligibility Criteria — CGPSC ADPP 2026

Make sure you meet both the education and age requirements before applying. CGPSC checks documents strictly at the time of the interview, so apply only if you qualify.

Educational Qualification

Candidates must hold a Law degree (LL.B. / Bachelor’s degree in Law) from any recognised university. You should possess the required qualification certificate as on the last date of online application. This is an ideal role for law and judicial job seekers starting their public-service career.

Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026)

The age limit is 21 to 30 years. Chhattisgarh State local residents get a relaxation of 5 years (up to 40 years), along with further relaxations as per category:

  • CG local SC / ST / OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): up to 5 years
  • CG local women candidates: up to 10 years
  • Persons with Disabilities: up to 5 years

What Is the Salary for CGPSC ADPP 2026?

The Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer post carries an excellent gazetted salary. This financial security, along with the prestige of a Class II officer role, makes it a sought-after job.

  • Pay Matrix Level-9: ₹38,100 – ₹1,20,400
  • Service Category: Gazetted Class II
  • Probation Period: 3 years

In addition to basic pay, selected officers receive Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per State Government rules issued from time to time.

What Is the Selection Process for CGPSC ADPP 2026?

CGPSC selects candidates through a written examination followed by an interview. Knowing the pattern early helps you plan your preparation properly.

  1. Written Examination of 300 marks — one objective paper of 150 questions for 3 hours, covering General Knowledge (100 marks) and Law (200 marks). There is negative marking of one-third for each wrong answer.
  2. Interview of 30 marks for candidates shortlisted from the written exam.

Together, the written examination and interview carry a combined 330 marks (300 + 30). If very few applications are received, the Commission may instead select candidates through a direct interview of 100 marks. You can review general exam syllabus and pattern guidance to prepare smartly.

Exam Centres — CGPSC ADPP 2026

The written examination will be conducted at the following five centres in Chhattisgarh. You can choose your preferred centre during the application.

  • Raipur
  • Bilaspur
  • Durg
  • Ambikapur
  • Jagdalpur

How to for CGPSC ADPP 2026?

The application is fully online through the CGPSC portal. Follow these steps carefully and submit before the deadline.

  1. Visit the official CGPSC online portal (link available in Essential Links below).
  2. Complete the one-time candidate registration and verify it using the OTP sent to your mobile and email.
  3. Upload a clear live photograph and your scanned signature as per the given specifications.
  4. Fill the application form for the ADPP post and pay the fee online.
  5. Confirm that the application status shows “Submitted” and save a printout for your records.

Important Dates — CGPSC ADPP 2026

Note down these dates so you do not miss any step. A free correction window is also available after the last date.

Application Fees — CGPSC ADPP 2026

The fee is paid online and varies based on category and domicile. A portal charge plus GST is payable additionally by all candidates.

Payment can be made online via Credit Card, Debit Card, Internet Banking or UPI. Cheque or demand draft is not accepted.

Essential Links — CGPSC ADPP 2026

  • Page
  • for CGPSC ADPP 2026
  • Visit CGPSC

This CGPSC ADPP recruitment is a wonderful opportunity for law graduates to begin a prestigious gazetted career with the Chhattisgarh Government. With only 15 posts, competition will be strong, so start your preparation early and apply before 21 July For more Chhattisgarh government job updates and other latest notifications, keep visiting daily.

jobDescription:

The Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt has invited applications for 06 contractual posts of Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA). Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly salary of ₹25,500/-.

✅ ACMS Delhi Cantt 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Lower Division Clerk (LDC)

Educational Qualification:

  • Graduate from a recognized university
  • Computer literate with minimum typing speed of 30 WPM
  • Minimum 3 years experience in a reputed organization (preferably educational institution)
  • For Ex-Servicemen (ESM): Completed 10 years of service as Clerk in the Army

Age Limit (as on 01 July 2026):

  • Below 45 years (other candidates)
  • Below 50 years (ESM candidates)
  • Below 55 years (JCOs – ESM)

Additional Requirements: Basic knowledge of accounts, medically fit, no disciplinary history.

Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA)

Educational Qualification:

  • Ex-Serviceman (ESM) from Army Medical Corps (AMC)
  • Retired House Keeper (AMC)
  • Minimum 15 years of service in Army Medical Corps

Age Limit (as on 01 July 2026): Below 53 years

Additional Requirements: Medically fit for the job, no disciplinary history.

  2. Interview

No Application Fee is required for this recruitment.

✅ How to Apply for ACMS Delhi Cantt Vacancy 2026

  2. Send the application through email to acms@awesindia.edu.in
  3. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line
  4. Applications should be addressed to “The Dean, Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt”
  5. Ensure the email reaches on or before 22 June 2026 (10:00 AM)
  6. Keep a copy of the sent email and documents for future reference

Posts on offer span scientific, technical, administrative, and support categories including Scientific Officer (C), Junior Engineer (B), Scientific Assistant (B), Administrative Assistant (B), Tradesman (B), Clerk (A), Work Assistant, Security Guard, and more. The last date to is 4 July 2026 at tifr.res.in. Pay scales range from ₹36,360 to ₹1,18,110 as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

Download - TIFR Recruitment 2026 Recruitment 2026

Advertisement No. 2026/6
Location TIFR Colaba, Mumbai - 400005
Total Posts 35
Application Mode Online only at tifr.res.in
Last Date to Apply 4 July 2026
tifr.res.in

TIFR Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

Candidates planning to apply for TIFR Recruitment 2026 must take note of the last date carefully. The notification was released with Advertisement No. 2026/6 and the online application portal is already active.

Event Date
Advertisement Release June 2026
Last Date to 4 July 2026

TIFR Recruitment 2026 - Salary & Pay Scale

Pay scales for all posts under TIFR Advertisement No. 2026/6 are as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (7th CPC) Pay Matrix. The Total Monthly Emoluments (TME) at the time of joining are as follows:

Post Pay Level (7th CPC) TME (₹)
Scientific Officer (C) Level-10, Stage-1 ₹1,18,110
Junior Engineer (B) Level-6, Stage-1 ₹73,020
Scientific Assistant (B) Level-6, Stage-1 ₹73,020
Administrative Assistant (B) Level-6, Stage-1 ₹73,020
Supervisor (Cosmetics Maintenance) Level-6, Stage-1 ₹73,020
Tradesman (B) [all trades] Level-3, Stage-1 ₹46,990
Laboratory Assistant (B) Level-3, Stage-1 ₹46,990
Clerk (A) Level-3, Stage-1 ₹46,990
Work Assistant (Auxiliary) Level-1, Stage-1 ₹36,360
Work Assistant (Technical) [all trades] Level-1, Stage-1 ₹36,360
Security Guard Level-1, Stage-1 ₹36,360
Project Administrative Assistant (B) Consolidated Pay (includes HRA) ₹63,900

Eligibility Criteria - Qualification & Age Limit

Each post under TIFR Recruitment 2026 carries specific eligibility requirements. The age limit is reckoned as on the closing date for receipt of applications (4 July 2026). Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Government servant candidates.

Scientific Officer (C) - Post 1 (OBC)

Qualification: BE/B.Tech (60% aggregate) in Computer Science, IT, or related engineering field. Experience: 1.5-3 years in System Administration/Network Administration. Age: Maximum 31 years.

Scientific Officer (C) - Post 2 (UR)

Qualification: BE/B.Tech (60% aggregate) in Mechanical Engineering. Experience: Minimum 2-3 years in cryogenic engineering. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Scientific Officer (C) - Post 3 (UR)

Qualification: Full-time M.Sc. (60% aggregate) in Chemistry, Biochemistry, Biology, Instrumentation or related discipline OR BE/B.Tech (60%) in the same disciplines. Experience: Minimum 1 year operating NMR Spectrometer. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Junior Engineer (B) - Post 4 (UR)

Qualification: Full-time Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (60% aggregate). Experience: 2 years in supervising maintenance of large Air-conditioning systems. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Scientific Assistant (B) - Posts 5, 6, 7

Qualification (Post 5 - SC): B.Sc. (60%) in Physics/Chemistry/Computer Science/IT/Electronics or Diploma in Engineering (60%) in CS/IT/Electronics + 2 years experience in IT support/system administration/networking. Age: Maximum 33 years. Qualification (Posts 6 & 7 - UR): B.Sc. (60%) or Engineering Diploma (60%) in relevant disciplines + minimum 1 year experience in programming/scripting or electronics/PCB designing. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Administrative Assistant (B) - Posts 8, 9, 10

Qualification: Graduate (55% aggregate) with proficiency in word processing/database/accounting + 5 years experience in Accounts/Purchase/Stores/General Admin/Establishment. Age: Posts 8 & 10 - Maximum 33 years; Post 9 (OBC) - Maximum 36 years.

Supervisor (Cosmetics Maintenance) - Post 11

Qualification: 3-year Degree in Hospitality Management + 2 years experience as Supervisor/Manager in a large Hotel/Hostel/Company. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Tradesman (B) [Plumber] - Posts 12 (3 posts)

Qualification: NTC (NCVT) in trade Plumber with 60% marks + 2 years experience; OR NAC (NCVT) in Plumber with 60% + 1 year experience. Age: Maximum 28 years (UR); Maximum 33 years (SC).

Tradesman (B) [Electrician] - Posts 13 & 15

Qualification: NTC (NCVT) in Electrician (60%) + 2 years experience; OR NAC (NCVT) in Electrician (60%) + 1 year experience. Age: Post 13 (OBC) - Maximum 31 years; Post 15 (UR) - Maximum 28 years.

Tradesman (B) [Welder] - Post 14 (EWS)

Qualification: NTC (NCVT) in Welder (60%) + 2 years experience; OR NAC (NCVT) in Welder (60%) + 1 year experience. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Tradesman (B) [Technician Mechatronics] - Post 16 (UR)

Qualification: NTC (NCVT) in Technician Mechatronics (60%) + 2 years experience; OR NAC (NCVT) in Technician Mechatronics (60%) + 1 year experience. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Laboratory Assistant (B) - Post 17 (UR)

Qualification: NTC (NCVT) in Air Conditioning (60%) + 2 years experience; OR NAC (NCVT) in Air Conditioning (60%) + 1 year experience. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Clerk (A) - Posts 18-21

Qualification: Graduate (50% aggregate) + knowledge of typing + computer proficiency (certified) + 1 year experience in clerical duties. Age: Post 18 (OBC) - Maximum 31 years; Posts 19, 20 (UR) - Maximum 28 years; Post 21 (EWS) - Maximum 28 years.

Work Assistant (Auxiliary) - Posts 22-24

Qualification: SSC or equivalent + 1 year experience in a reputed canteen/catering establishment. Age: UR - Maximum 28 years; OBC - Maximum 31 years.

Work Assistant (Technical) - Posts 25-28

Qualification: SSC or NTC (NCVT) in respective trade (Air Conditioning / Painter / Plumber / Fitter) + 1 year relevant experience. Age: Maximum 28 years.

Security Guard - Post 29 (3 posts, UR)

Qualification: SSC or equivalent + minimum 3 years experience in Defence/CAPF/Security work + Firefighting/First Aid/NCC/Civil Defence certificate. Physical standards: Male - Height ≥165 cm, Chest 80-85 cm; Female - Height ≥157 cm. Eyesight: 6/6 (minimum). Age: Maximum 28 years.

Project Administrative Assistant (B) - Post 30 (UR)

Qualification: Graduate (55% aggregate) + word processing/database/accounting proficiency + 5 years experience in Accounts/Purchase/Stores/General Admin. Knowledge of GFR and CPWD procurement procedures desirable. Age: Maximum 33 years.

TIFR Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection mode for TIFR 2026 varies by post category. Candidates should note that merely fulfilling the minimum qualifications does not guarantee a call for the recruitment process — TIFR reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifications and experience higher than the prescribed minimum.

Post Mode of Recruitment
Scientific Officer (C) - Post 1 Personal Interview
Scientific Officer (C) - Posts 2 & 3 Written Test and Personal Interview
Junior Engineer (B) Personal Interview
Scientific Assistant (B) - Post 5 Personal Interview
Scientific Assistant (B) - Post 6 Written Examination and Personal Interview
Scientific Assistant (B) - Post 7 Written Test and Personal Interview or Personal Interview only
Administrative Assistant (B) - Post 8 Written Test and Skill Test
Administrative Assistant (B) - Post 9 Written Test and Skill Test
Administrative Assistant (B) - Post 10 Written Test and Skill Test
Supervisor (Cosmetics Maintenance) Written Test and Skill Test
Tradesman (B) [Plumber, Electrician, Welder, Mechatronics] Written Test and Trade Test
Laboratory Assistant (B) Written Test and Trade Test
Clerk (A) - all posts Written Test and Skill Test
Work Assistant (Auxiliary) - all posts Written Test and Skill Test
Work Assistant (Technical) - all posts Written Test and Trade Test
Security Guard Written Test, Physical Fitness Test, and Physical Efficiency Test
Project Administrative Assistant (B) Written Test and Skill Test

TIFR reserves the right to conduct all written tests, skill tests, and interviews either online or in-person.

TIFR Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply

Applications for TIFR Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online only at tifr.res.in. No offline or postal applications will be accepted. Government/Semi-Government/PSU employees, if called for the selection process, must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer.

  1. Visit the official TIFR website at tifr.res.in.
  2. Navigate to the Careers / Recruitment section.
  3. Click on Advertisement No. 2026/6 and read the full notification carefully.
  4. Click "" for the relevant post.
  5. Register and fill in all personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
  6. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and relevant certificates.
  7. Submit the online application before 4 July 2026.
  8. Take a printout of the completed application form for future reference.

Documents Required for TIFR Recruitment 2026

Candidates called for the selection process must bring originals along with copies of the following documents:

  • Printout of the online application form
  • Valid photo identity proof (Aadhaar Card / Voter ID / PAN Card / Passport / Driving Licence)
  • Date of birth proof
  • Educational qualification certificates and marksheets (all semesters/years)
  • Experience certificates
  • Character certificates from two respectable persons
  • SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD certificate in Government of India format (wherever applicable)
  • OBC Non-Creamy Layer certificate valid preferably for the current financial year
  • EWS certificate valid preferably for the current financial year
  • PwBD candidates must submit Disability Certificate showing minimum 40% disability

Salary & Appointment Terms

Candidates wondering about appointment duration can note that for posts at Sr. Nos. 1 to 7 and 12 to 17, the initial appointment will be for 3 years including a 1-year probation period. Continuation beyond 3 years is subject to comprehensive performance review; upon successful review, the appointment continues till superannuation at age Post No. 30 (Project Administrative Assistant) is a temporary, non-pensionable contract appointment, renewable annually up to a total of 3 years. All other selected candidates (Posts 1-29) will be governed by the National Pension System (NPS) unless already covered under CCS (Pension) Rules 1972.

Candidates selected for posts at Sr. Nos. 12 to 17 and 22 to 29 will be required to work on Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays and must be prepared for shift duties as per institutional requirements.

Who Should NOT Apply

  • Candidates who have completed only a part-time or correspondence degree where the notification requires a full-time degree.
  • OBC candidates without a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate for the current financial year.
  • Candidates who cannot produce grade-to-percentage conversion certificates from their university, where applicable.
  • Candidates already in government service who are unable to obtain an NOC from their employer before the selection stage.
  • Candidates for Security Guard posts who do not meet the prescribed physical standards (height, chest, eyesight).
