Original Job Details / Description

Developex is looking for an experienced Project Manager to help provide excellent service to our clients and participate in presale activities.

Requirements:

  • 4+ years of experience as an IT Project Manager.
  • Ability to organize work of the team (5+ employees) and customer cooperation.
  • Understanding of the development process: release management, engineering infrastructure, Agile/SCRUM.
  • Experience in preparing project documentation (PRD, Roadmap, effort estimation, WBS, team workload plan etc.).
  • Experience in presale is a must!
  • Familiar with system design, ability to do research on possible technical solutions for a business goal, or on a new technology - will be a great plus!
  • Excellent written and spoken English, perfect communication skills.
  • Good understanding of the technical side of projects.
  • Experience and understanding of at least some of the technical domains and OS platforms: embedded, desktop, web (frontend), cloud, host-device communication, AI/ML.

Soft skills:

  • Perfect communication skills.
  • Independent thinking.
  • Motivation for quality and results.
  • Flexible, inventive, creative mind.
  • Good multi-tasking skills and ability to switch.
  • Good problem-solving skills.

Good to have:

  • BA background is a great plus.
  • A Product Owner/Marketing mindset and ability to research potential technical solutions or new technologies.
  • Experience in presale activities is a plus:
    • Prepare effort estimation for a future project with engineering team.
    • Ability to research a client or possible technical solutions for a business goal, or new technologies.
  • Profound knowledge in one or more of the listed business domains is a plus: gaming, healthcare, consumer electronics or audio.

We offer:

  • Competitive compensation commensurate with your experience and contribution to the company.
  • Attractive benefits package including paid vacations, sick leave, medical insurance, and other perks.
  • Convenient and flexible work schedule allowing for an ideal work-life balance.
  • Opportunities for professional growth and realization of potential within promising projects.
  • Paid training and seminars for continuous learning and development.
  • Friendly atmosphere and healthy relationships within a team of professionals.
  • Stability and reliability of the company.

Join Developex and become part of our innovative team!

description: Senior DevOps Engineer (Web3
jobDescription:
Career Opportunity: Senior DevOps Engineer (Web3) at Top Company

Senior DevOps Engineer (Web3)

Key Highlights & Job Details

About Top Company

Top Company is a leading global technology and services organization known for delivering innovative solutions and cultivating a growth-oriented workforce.

Why You Should Join

This role offers an exceptional opportunity to collaborate with industry professionals on impactful projects, accelerate your skill development, and build a rewarding long-term career.

How to Apply

To apply for this role, click on the application link below to navigate to the official Top Company careers page, fill out the application form with your details, upload your resume, and submit.

Final Thoughts

Make sure to apply as soon as possible before the application window closes. Share this opportunity with your friends who might be interested.

Original Job Details / Description

Shape the Future of Blockchain—Bringing Business On-Chain

We’re offering a unique opportunity to join Launch Legends (and Autheo) as a part-time Equity Cofounder. Founded nearly four years ago, Launch Legends is at the forefront of bridging Web3 blockchain technology with the next evolution of Web2 integration—bringing businesses on-chain through enterprise-grade solutions, DePIN innovations, and decentralized financial infrastructure.

Our flagship project, Autheo, is an AI enabled Layer-Zero OS with an integrated Layer-1 blockchain and complete decentralized infrastructure thast includes decentralized compute, storage, identity, and service marketplaces, as well as a Full-stack development enveronment (DevHub)—engineered for scalable enterprise adoption, developer innovation, and real-world blockchain integration.

Our Projects

  • Autheo – www.autheo.com
  • Autheo Team - https://www.autheo.com/teams
  • Launch Legends (Parent Company) – www.launchlegends.io
  • Twitter: https://x.com/Autheo_Network

About Autheo

With nearly 100 equity cofounders from leading companies and institutions—many with advanced degrees and PhDs—Autheo is solving the critical challenges blocking business adoption of blockchain technology.

Key Features:

  • Enterprise-Grade Layer-1 Blockchain – High-speed, self-securing, and cost-efficient infrastructure built for scale.
  • Developer Hub & Application Marketplace – A decentralized platform where developers build, deploy, and monetize real-world apps.
  • Web2-Web3 Integration – Microservices, SDKs, and governance frameworks for seamless business migration.
  • Decentralized Cloud & Compute – Secure, privacy-preserving storage and AI-powered compute for next-gen applications.
  • DePIN Infrastructure – On-chain networks powering real-world infrastructure ownership and resource sharing.

Traction (Testnet Launch):

  • Wallet Accounts: 290,000+
  • Twitter Followers: 30,000+
  • Discord Members: 19,000+
  • Smart Contracts Deployed: 30,000+
  • Developers Registered for MVP DevHub: 7,500+

Compensation & Growth Path

This is a part time equity / token-based cofounder opportunity. You will receive equity in Launch Legends, Autheo, and the WFO Creator Network, along with token allocations in the Autheo blockchain. We have already completed an initial financing round to support infrastructure and marketing, and are currently in discussions with VCs and crypto investors to fund expansion and salaries. Salaried compensation is expected to begin within 4 to 5 months, following our node, token sales or funding.

POSITION - SENIOR DEVOPS ENGINEER (WEB3)

We are seeking a highly experienced and knowledgeable DevOps Specialist to join our team as a co-founder. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in DevOps for blockchain systems, experience with Digital Ocean and other cloud platforms, and proficiency with GitHub. This role is crucial for the successful implementation and maintenance of our blockchain infrastructure.

Responsibilities

:

  • Design, implement, and manage the infrastructure for our blockchain ecosystem
    Take ownership of designing, implementing, and managing the company's cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare. Architect and optimize cloud solutions to ensure scalability, security, and efficiency on Layer 1 and Layer 2.
  • Optimize the deployment, monitoring, and scaling of blockchain nodes and related services.
  • Automate the deployment process using CI/CD pipelines.
  • Ensure high availability, reliability, and security of the infrastructure.
  • Collaborate with the development team to integrate DevOps practices and tools.
  • Manage and optimize cloud resources on platforms Digital Ocean and other cloud platforms such as Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
  • Maintain and manage code repositories and workflows on GitHub.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure-related issues
  • Continuously improve and document DevOps processes and best practices.
  • Expertise in AWS services, EC2, S3, RDS, and Lambda, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, etc.
  • Implement monitoring solutions to ensure proactive identification and resolution of issues.
  • Tooling such as Salt, Vault, Python, and Bash scripting for automation and configuration management and version control using Git to manage code repositories effectively
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand application requirements and provide infrastructure solutions. Lead and mentor a team of DevOps professionals, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and innovation.
  • Maintain comprehensive documentation of infrastructure configurations, processes, and best practices
  • Stay abreast of industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices to drive continuous improvement in the DevOps practices.

Requirements:

  • Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer (8+ years experience), with additional in blockchain projects.
  • Strong knowledge of cloud platforms, especially Digital Ocean, and experience with other cloud services (e.g., AWS, Oracle Cloud).
  • Proficiency in using and managing GitHub repositories and workflows.
  • Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.
  • Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible).
  • Strong scripting skills (e.g., Bash, Python).
  • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI).
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Strong communication and collaboration abilities.Expert knowledge of infrastructure and DevOps with experience in AWS services, IAM policies, Terraform, Docker and Kubernete
  • Must have significant Web3 and Blockchain Experience in decentralized systems.
  • Proficiency in Salt, Vault, Python and Bash scripting.
  • Proficiency in CDN Management.
  • Knowledge of AWS Secrets Manage.
  • Able to lead a small team of DevOps engineers, this role is mostly hands-on with a managerial component.
  • Possess a understanding of networking principles and be adept at configuring and troubleshooting network components within the cloud environment.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with Testnet and Mainnet blockchain deployments
  • Experience with deploying Nodes and Setting up Validators
  • Experience with Digital Ocean and GitHub.
  • Understanding of blockchain technologies and protocols.
  • Previous startup experience and a passion for innovation.

WHY JOIN LAUNCH LEGENDS?

  • Traction with Momentum: Autheo is already gaining significant traction in the blockchain space, with rapid developer adoption, platform growth, and partnership interest.
  • Cross-Industry Impact; Autheo is positioned to transform not only the Web3 ecosystem—but also Web2 and the broader technology sector—by enabling real-world business adoption of decentralized infrastructure.
  • Real Innovation, Not Hype: Unlike many blockchain ventures, Autheo is focused on substance over speculation. We are building real solutions: modular fullstack infrastructure, enterprise-grade toolkits, decentralized identity, cloud, compute, and service orchestration.
  • Backed by Elite Talent: You’ll join a team composed of professionals from top-tier universities, Fortune 500 companies, and major blockchain platforms. Our team includes multiple PhDs and senior engineers who have launched and scaled world-class technologies.

If you're ready to redefine blockchain adoption, empower global business integration, and help shape the next generation of Web3 and developer ecosystems, we invite you to take the next step.

APPLY

Rithum is hiring a

Remote North America Field Marketing and Events Manager

Rithum™ is the world’s most trusted commerce network, accelerating how brands, suppliers, and retailers work together to deliver seamless e-commerce experiences. We provide an unmatched platform for brands and retailers, enabling them to accelerate growth, optimize operations across channels, scale product offerings and enhance margins. Today, more than 40,000 companies trust Rithum to grow their business across hundreds of channels, representing over $50 billion in annual GMV. Using our commerce, marketing, and delivery solutions, our customers create optimized consumer shopping journeys from beginning to end. Overview At Rithum, we empower commerce growth by connecting brands, retailers, and suppliers. As the North America Field Marketing & Events Manager, you are responsible for designing and executing a dynamic portfolio of events—including client conferences, industry trade shows, internal company gatherings, executive dinners, and multi-city roadshows—while driving localized marketing strategies to generate demand, accelerate the sales pipeline, and align with Rithum’s strategic business objectives. You collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful events that inspire clients and engage industry leaders. In conjunction with senior marketing leadership, you develop regional strategies, optimize processes, and deliver high-impact experiences that elevate Rithum’s brand visibility and client engagement in North America. Responsibilities - Define and execute a North America field events plan to enhance brand visibility and achieve measurable business goals. - Develop and execute localized marketing strategies to drive demand, generate leads, and accelerate the sales pipeline in specific regions. - Build collaborative relationships with key internal stakeholders (regional sales stakeholders, marketing, content, product, client success) and external partners to create and deliver seamless, impactful events aligned with business goals. - Plan and execute a broad range of events, from high-touch executive dinners to mid-scale multi-city roadshows, with clear objectives, tracking, and measurement for each event. - Lead event execution, including budgeting, pre- and post-event marketing, logistics, vendor management, and post-event analysis for regional events. - Track key event metrics for North America events such as attendance, leads generated, opportunities and pipeline generated, and client feedback to evaluate event success. - Track event performance metrics and KPIs, presenting actionable insights to stakeholders to drive continuous improvement. - Leverage company websites, online content, industry trends, and emerging technologies to enhance the client experience and event effectiveness. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications - 5+ years in field/corporate events management within a technology, software or e-commerce organization with a focus on North America events. - Previous experience in events and field marketing within the e-commerce sector, with a focus on engaging e-commerce audiences. - Demonstrated experience leading and executing industry events, similar to Shoptalk, NRF, or eTail. - Successful ownership and management of event budgets across varying scale and complexity. - Proven experience planning and executing events with #Location United States

title: Top Company Founding Designer Hiring 2026
description: Founding Designer
jobDescription:
Leap

Apply now

Share this job: <input class="share-job-copy-paste" readonly="" style="" type="text" value="https://remoteok.com/remote-jobs/remote-founding-designer-leap-1133489?ref=sh"/>
Get a rok.co short link

Leap is hiring a

Remote Founding Designer

About Leap

Leap is one of the fastest-growing benefits solutions and a category-defining pioneer in employer specialty pharmacy. We are reshaping how life-changing therapies are delivered and financed, ensuring patients get the treatment they need while employers finally get a fair deal.

Specialty drugs and infusions represent nearly 10% of all healthcare spend and are the fastest-growing cost category for employers. Leap tackles this challenge with a novel approach: eliminating hidden markups, expanding access to high-quality infusion providers, and bringing clarity and fairness to how therapies are priced and paid for.

We’re proud to partner with numerous Fortune 500 companies and leading TPAs. Each patient we serve creates immediate ROI: lower costs, improved access, and better care. Join us as we redefine what’s possible in specialty care.

About The Role

We’re hiring Leap’s Founding Designer: the person who will define how Leap shows up to patients and families.

This is a rare design opportunity. Leap helps people access complex, high-cost therapies at moments that are often stressful, confusing, and clinically serious. Patients may be hearing from us for the first time while navigating a new diagnosis, an unfamiliar treatment, or a healthcare system that has already made them feel lost. Great design can make the difference between hesitation and action.

Your first priority will be Member Growth. You’ll help create the campaigns and member communications that introduce Leap, earn trust quickly, and make the next step feel clear. But this is not just a campaign design role. The larger mandate is to shape the patient-facing experience: how people discover Leap, understand their options, schedule care, prepare for treatment, stay engaged, and come back when they need support.

We’re looking for someone who can move fluidly between strategy and execution. One day, you may be mapping a patient journey or learning from a Care Guide where members get stuck. The next, you may be designing a landing page, improving a direct mail concept, tightening a message hierarchy, or building a reusable pattern the whole team can use. The work will be hands-on, but the impact should be company-wide.

You do not need to be a copywriter, researcher, product manager, or front-end developer. But you should have the range to be an exceptional creative partner across all of those disciplines: someone with strong user judgment, excellent design taste, clear communication, modern production fluency, and the ability to bring structure to ambiguous problems.

What You’ll Accomplish

  • Define Leap’s patient-facing design standard. You’ll shape how Leap shows up across marketing, onboarding, education, therapy support, and reactivation, creating a coherent experience that feels credible, human, and easy to act on.
  • Design the end-to-end member journey. You’ll work with Member Growth, care teams, clinical operations, product, and content to understand where patients are confused, skeptical, overwhelmed, or dropping off — then turn those insights into clearer, lower-friction experiences across awareness, consult scheduling, onboarding, therapy support, adherence, and reactivation.
  • Build the systems that let great design scale. You’ll create reusable patterns, components, templates, QA processes, AI-assisted workflows, and production standards across web, email, direct mail, print, swag, educational materials, and internal workflows.
  • Improve member activation through high-performing creative. You’ll design direct-response campaigns across direct mail, email, landing pages, paid ads, multi-step funnels, and related channels, with every decision tied to clarity, trust, conversion, and action.
  • Turn healthcare complexity into simple, responsible experiences. Leap operates in a category that is clinically nuanced, emotionally sensitive, and operationally complex. You’ll make difficult information easier to understand without oversimplifying, overpromising, or creating unnecessary anxiety.
  • Act as a creative lead and hands-on maker. You’ll shape briefs, guide visual systems, improve message hierarchy, coordinate copy, illustration, motion, web, lifecycle, and vendor partners as needed, and still stay close enough to the work to design and produce polished, production-ready assets yourself.

What We’re Looking For

  • A broad designer with strong patient/customer experience judgment You know how to simplify complexity, reduce friction, build trust quickly, and make the next step feel obvious for people making meaningful decisions. You’ve done this specifically in lifecycle marketing, member engagement, patient education, or high-consideration consumer decisions.
  • Strong product, UX, and research instincts. You can map journeys, structure information, design flows, talk to users and internal teams, identify patterns, and translate qualitative insight into better experiences.
  • Direct-response and growth design experience. You have designed creative where success was measured by conversion, activation, enrollment, response rate, lead generation, or another measurable action.
  • Excellent visual design craft and message hierarchy. Your work is clean, thoughtful, and disciplined. You know how to use hierarchy, typography, layout, imagery, pacing, narrative, headlines, and CTAs to guide attention and drive action.
  • Experience building systems, not just assets. You can create reusable patterns, templates, standards, and workflows that make a company’s creative output more coherent, scalable, and efficient.
  • Print, digital, and modern production fluency. You understand what it takes to get direct mail to press, launch landing pages, design for email constraints, QA assets, and work effectively with vendors and channel owners. You are fluent in contemporary design tools and have strong opinions about how AI is changing creative workflows.
  • Comfortable directing outside creative talent. You know how to brief, manage, and review work from agencies and contractors, giving clear direction, holding the line on quality and brand, and keeping projects on schedule even when you’re the only in-house designer.
  • High agency, low ego, and comfort with complexity. You can create structure from ambiguity, move fast, explain your decisions clearly, incorporate feedback across functions, and design in regulated, emotionally sensitive environments where accuracy, trust, and nuance matter.

Nice-to-Haves

  • Experience in healthcare, benefits, insurance, pharmacy, financial services, or another regulated category.
  • Experience with HubSpot, Customer.io, Braze, Iterable, Mailchimp, Webflow, Framer, or similar marketing, lifecycle, and landing-page tools.
  • Familiarity with HTML/CSS, responsive design, accessibility, and real-world email or landing-page constraints.
  • Motion, GIF, video, illustration, or lightweight digital ad production experience.
  • Experience building or improving creative workflows, templates, design systems, AI-assisted production processes, or campaign QA systems.

At Leap, we’re building an outlier company with real impact — and that takes focus, energy, and commitment. If that excites you, we’d love to hear from you.

Leap is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds. We’re committed to building a team that reflects a diversity of perspectives, experiences, and identities.

Compensation Range: $140K - $190K

Stableton Financial AG is hiring a

Remote Chief of Staff Operating Partner CEO Office

About Stableton

Stableton is a globally leading, tech- and data-driven institutional investor in private blue-chip tech companies. We empower institutional investors, private banks, and wealth managers to benefit from the value creation of the world's most valuable technology companies through our unique unicorn index investment funds and institutional thematic investment mandates.

With our disruptive mindset, fast-paced culture, and track record of innovation, we are reshaping private market investing. With seven years of 100%+ annual growth, we are scaling globally — and we're just getting started.

About The Role

Reporting directly to the CEO, you will play a key role in turning strategy into action. You'll partner closely with the CEO, CFO, and executive leadership to tackle the company's hardest-to-overcome hurdles, ensuring our corporate priorities are well-defined, aligned across teams, and executed with speed and clarity.

You'll serve as a strategic force multiplier and trusted advisor, operating as a "Swiss army knife" problem solver. This role is for someone who thrives in an environment where ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement are the norm. You'll challenge the status quo, optimize how we operate, and help leaders navigate complex challenges with a solutions-oriented mindset.

It's a strategic operating position with direct exposure to executive decision-making, board-level discussions, and company-defining initiatives.

Your Responsibilities

Strategic Initiative Leadership

  • Drive execution of the CEO's top-priority initiatives, ensuring clear accountability and measurable impact
  • Take ownership of multiple high-stakes projects and deliver business value through the creation, optimization, and maintenance of processes and products
  • Identify new growth and revenue opportunities across existing and adjacent markets, building the business cases and leading the resulting initiatives — from new product launches to market expansion and operational transformation programs
  • Support the design of new investment products, owning project leadership and execution across internal and external stakeholders

M&A, Business Development & Partnerships

  • Support M&A activities from target identification through due diligence, deal execution, and post-merger integration
  • Drive business development by identifying, evaluating, and negotiating strategic partnerships and commercial relationships

Operational Excellence, Executive Support & Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Build and optimize scalable processes to support rapid growth, identify roadblocks, and facilitate resolutions with speed and efficiency
  • Develop compelling narratives for internal and external stakeholders, including board materials, investor presentations, and executive communications
  • Act as a trusted advisor to the CEO and leadership team, elevating insights on operations and strategic opportunities
  • Connect the dots across the CEO, CFO, structuring, investment, investment operations, tech, and sales teams — driving alignment and coordination through the conceptualization, design, and launch of new financial products, and streamlining decision-making to solve problems and keep teams moving

Requirements

Experience & Competencies

  • 4+ years at a top-tier investment bank, management consulting firm (McKinsey, Bain, BCG, etc.), private equity fund, or similar elite institution
  • Track record of outstanding achievement with strong analytical skills and ability to synthesize complex information into clear, compelling narratives for C-suite and board audiences
  • Strategic thinking and cross-functional collaboration: Proven ability to drive initiatives, identify opportunities, and bring diverse teams together to solve problems in fast-paced environments

Personal Attributes

  • Bias for action with ownership mentality: Take initiative, anticipate challenges, and take 100% responsibility for results
  • Adaptability and "can-do" attitude: Pivot on the fly, thrive under pressure, and create high-quality work on quick timelines
  • Team player with direct communication style: Low ego, high output; comfortable with candid feedback and sees challenges as growth opportunities

Preferred

  • MBA or advanced degree; experience working directly with CEO/C-Suite; background in fintech, financial services, private markets, or technology; M&A or business development experience
  • While this could be an entirely remote position working European working hours, the ability to work from Zurich is a plus.

Benefits

What We Offer

  • Career-defining opportunity: Direct access to the CEO, co-founders, and executive team with insight into every strategic decision
  • Impact & ownership: Shape the direction of a fast-growing, globally expanding company
  • Exceptional team: Work alongside a hungry and driven team, and top talent from elite banks, consulting firms, and technology companies
  • Competitive compensation: Base salary, performance bonus, equity participation, and comprehensive benefits
  • Fast-paced culture: High-performance environment that values results, innovation, and continuous learning

Stableton is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Salary and compensation


Upgrade to Premium to see salary and compensation for all jobs.


Location


Zürich, Zürich, Zürich, Schweiz

title: UKSSSC Junior Assistant & Stenographer Recruitment 2026: for 398 Posts
description: A Big Court Jobs Chance in Uttarakhand for 2026 The Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UKSSSC) has released a fresh notification to fill 398 posts of Junior Assi
jobDescription:
A Big Court Jobs Chance in Uttarakhand for 2026

The Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UKSSSC) has released a fresh notification to fill 398 posts of Junior Assistant (Kanisth Sahayak) and Stenographer Grade-1 / Personal Assistant in the Civil Courts and Family Courts working under the Nainital High Court. For thousands of graduates in the state hoping for a stable government job, this is a very good chance. If you are looking for government jobs in Uttarakhand, you should read this notification carefully. Don’t worry — we will explain every detail in simple words.

The online application window is open from 22 June 2026 to 6 July 2026, so you have a short time to . These court jobs come with good pay scales, job security and respect. In this article on , we will cover the full vacancy details, eligibility, typing and shorthand speed, salary, selection process, fees and a step-by-step apply guide. Read till the end so nothing is missed.

Key Highlights — UKSSSC Junior Assistant & Stenographer 2026

These posts are part of the court system in Uttarakhand and are filled through a written exam followed by a skill test. Here are the key points every graduate aspirant should note.

  • Recruiting Body: UKSSSC (for Civil & Family Courts under Nainital High Court)
  • Total Vacancies: 398 posts
  • Posts: Junior Assistant (Kanisth Sahayak) and Stenographer Grade-1 / Personal Assistant
  • Salary / Pay: ₹21,700 – ₹1,42,400 per month (as per pay level)
  • Last Date to Apply: 6 July 2026

UKSSSC Vacancy Breakdown 2026

The 398 posts are split between two cadres and across Civil Courts and Family Courts. The table below shows the simple split.

Out of the 259 Junior Assistant posts, 230 are in Civil Courts and 29 are in Family Courts. Out of the 139 Stenographer / Personal Assistant posts, 128 are in Civil Courts and 11 are in Family Courts. This makes up the full count of 398 vacancies.

UKSSSC Eligibility Criteria 2026

Please check both the education and age rules before you . Both posts are open to graduates from any stream.

Educational Qualification

  • A Graduation degree in any discipline from a recognised University or Institution.
  • Good knowledge of Hindi and English is required, as court work is done in both languages.
  • If you are a graduate looking for government jobs, you are eligible to apply for these posts.

Age Limit

  • Candidates must be between 21 and 35 years of age as on 1 January 2026.
  • Age relaxation is given to reserved category candidates as per Uttarakhand Government rules.

Typing and Shorthand Speed Requirements

Apart from the degree, each post needs a specific skill which is tested separately. Make sure you meet the skill requirement for your post.

  • Junior Assistant: Hindi typing 25 words per minute OR English typing 30 words per minute, with a computer typing speed of about 4,000 key depressions per hour.
  • Stenographer / Personal Assistant: shorthand speed of 80 words per minute in Hindi or English.

What is the Salary for UKSSSC Junior Assistant & Stenographer 2026?

The salary is as per the Uttarakhand State Pay Matrix and is quite attractive for a starting government job.

  • Junior Assistant (Kanisth Sahayak): Pay scale ₹21,700 – ₹69,100 (Pay Level 3).
  • Stenographer Grade-1 / Personal Assistant: Pay scale ranging from ₹29,200 – ₹92,300 up to ₹44,900 – ₹1,42,400, depending on the grade.

Along with the basic pay, selected candidates also receive Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance and other benefits as per state government rules.

What is the Selection Process for UKSSSC 2026?

The selection has two main parts — a written examination and a skill test. The simple steps are below.

  1. Submit your online application within the given dates.
  2. Appear for the written examination conducted by UKSSSC.
  3. Qualify and then appear for the typing or shorthand skill test (60 marks).
  4. Document verification of all original certificates.
  5. Final merit list and appointment to the court.

UKSSSC Exam Pattern and Skill Test

The written exam tests general knowledge, Hindi, English, reasoning and basic awareness suited to court work. After the written test, shortlisted candidates take a skill test of 60 marks — typing for Junior Assistant and shorthand for Stenographer / Personal Assistant. For detailed topic-wise preparation, see the exam syllabus and pattern guidance on our site.

How to for UKSSSC 2026?

The full application process is online through the UKSSSC website. Follow these steps before the last date.

  1. Visit the official UKSSSC application portal (link given in Essential Links below).
  2. Register using your mobile number and email ID to get login details.
  3. Fill the online form with correct personal, education and category details.
  4. Upload your photo, signature and required documents in the given format.
  5. Pay the application fee online and submit the form, then take a printout for your record.

UKSSSC Important Dates 2026

UKSSSC Application Fees 2026

The application fee depends on your category. It must be paid online while submitting the form.

Essential Links — UKSSSC Junior Assistant & Stenographer 2026

  • Page
  • at UKSSSC Portal
  • Visit UKSSSC

This UKSSSC recruitment is a wonderful chance for graduates in Uttarakhand to build a secure career in the court system. If you have the required degree and typing or shorthand skill, start your preparation now and apply before 6 July 2026. For more Uttarakhand government job updates, keep visiting daily.

title: OFCH Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Apply Offline for 140 Graduate & Technician Apprentice Posts
description: Apprentice Training Chance at Ordnance Factory Chanda 2026 Ordnance Factory Chanda (OFCH), a unit of Munitions India Limited under the Ministry of Defence, has invited applications
jobDescription:
Apprentice Training Chance at Ordnance Factory Chanda 2026

Ordnance Factory Chanda (OFCH), a unit of Munitions India Limited under the Ministry of Defence, has invited applications for 140 Apprentice posts for one year of practical training under the Apprentices Act, This is a great starting point for fresh engineering graduates, general graduates and diploma holders who want hands-on experience in a respected defence undertaking. If you are exploring defence sector government jobs, this apprenticeship is worth applying for. Don’t worry — we will explain everything in very simple words.

The last date to apply is 9 July 2026, and the application is offline in the prescribed format. Apprenticeship training gives you valuable experience, a monthly stipend, and a strong line on your resume. In this article on , we will explain the vacancy details, eligibility, stipend, selection method, important conditions and how to apply step by step. Please read till the end.

Key Highlights — OFCH Apprentice Recruitment 2026

OFCH is located in Chandrapur district of Maharashtra and works under Munitions India Limited, a Government of India defence enterprise that manufactures ammunition and explosives for the armed forces. Training at such an organisation gives you exposure to real industrial work and modern machines. Here are the key points of this apprenticeship at a glance.

  • Organisation: Ordnance Factory Chanda (Unit of Munitions India Limited)
  • Post: Graduate Apprentice and Technician Apprentice
  • Total Vacancies: 140 apprentice posts
  • Stipend: ₹10,900 – ₹12,300 per month
  • Last Date to Apply (Offline): 9 July 2026

OFCH Apprentice Vacancy Breakdown 2026

The 140 apprentice posts are divided into three groups based on your qualification. The simple table below shows the split.

Posts in each group are reserved for SC, ST, OBC, EWS and Persons with Disabilities (PwD) candidates as per the roster given in the , with the remaining seats for the Unreserved category.

OFCH Apprentice Eligibility Criteria 2026

Please read the education and age conditions carefully, as apprenticeship rules are slightly different from normal jobs.

Educational Qualification

  • Graduate Apprentice (Engineering): passed final year degree in Engineering or Technology in Mechanical, Electrical or Civil branch.
  • Graduate Apprentice (General): Bachelor of Science, Bachelor of Commerce or Bachelor of Computer Application.
  • Technician Apprentice: Diploma in Engineering or Technology in Mechanical, Electrical or Civil from a recognised Board of Technical Education.
  • Selection is purely on the merit of marks obtained in the final year of the Degree or Diploma examination.

Age Limit

  • The minimum age is 14 years, and there is no upper age limit for this apprenticeship.
  • This makes the apprenticeship open to a very wide group of candidates.

OFCH Apprentice Stipend and Salary 2026

Apprentices are paid a monthly stipend during the one-year training period. The stipend amount depends on the type of apprenticeship.

  • Graduate Apprentice: ₹12,300 per month (shared equally by OFCH and BOAT Mumbai).
  • Technician Apprentice: ₹10,900 per month (shared equally by OFCH and BOAT Mumbai).

The stipend is paid every month during the training, giving you both experience and a steady income for one year.

Please remember that an apprenticeship is a training programme and not a permanent job. However, the one year of hands-on experience at a defence unit and the National Apprenticeship Certificate you receive at the end are highly valued, and they also help you in future government, PSU and private sector recruitments.

What is the Selection Process for OFCH Apprentice 2026?

There is no written examination. Selection is based on merit. The simple steps are below.

  1. Submit your offline application in the prescribed format before the last date.
  2. Applications are screened for eligibility under the Apprentices Act.
  3. A merit list is prepared based on final year Degree or Diploma marks.
  4. Selected candidates are called for document verification.
  5. Final engagement as an apprentice for one year of training.

Since there is no written test, your final year percentage matters the most. Candidates with higher marks have a much better chance of being selected, so your past academic performance is the key to getting this apprenticeship.

Important Eligibility Conditions to Remember

These two conditions are very important for apprenticeship and many candidates miss them, so please check carefully.

  • You should not have training or job experience of one year or more after completing your qualification.
  • You should not have completed more than 5 years after obtaining your Degree or Diploma.

How to Apply Offline for OFCH Apprentice 2026?

The application is offline by post, not online. Follow these steps and apply before the last date.

  1. Download the prescribed application form and terms from the (link given in Essential Links below).
  2. Fill the form carefully in block letters with all correct details.
  3. Affix one passport-size photograph on the form and keep one more loose photo signed.
  4. Attach attested copies of all required certificates.
  5. Send the complete application by post to the Chief General Manager, Ordnance Factory Chanda, District Chandrapur, Maharashtra – 442501, so that it reaches before 9 July 2026.

Documents Required with Application

  • SSLC (10th) certificate as proof of date of birth.
  • Mark sheets and certificate of the Degree or Diploma examination.
  • Category certificate (SC, ST, OBC or EWS) if applicable.
  • PwD certificate if applying under that category.
  • Two recent passport-size photographs.

OFCH Apprentice Important Dates 2026

OFCH Apprentice Application Fees 2026

As per the , no application fee has been mentioned for this apprenticeship. Candidates from all categories may apply free of cost.

Essential Links — OFCH Apprentice Recruitment 2026

  • Page
  • Visit Munitions India / OFCH

This OFCH apprenticeship is a valuable chance for fresh graduates and diploma holders to gain real experience in a defence organisation while earning a monthly stipend. If you are eligible, fill the form carefully and post it well before 9 July 2026. For more PSU and defence job updates, keep visiting every day.

title: BEL Recruitment 2026 for Trainee Engineer, EAT & Technician: for 16 Chennai Posts
description: Join Bharat Electronics at its Chennai Unit in 2026 Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), a Navratna Defence PSU under the Ministry of Defence, has released a recruitment notification
jobDescription:
Join Bharat Electronics at its Chennai Unit in 2026

Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), a Navratna Defence PSU under the Ministry of Defence, has released a recruitment notification for 16 posts at its Chennai Unit. The posts include Trainee Engineer-I, Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT) and Technician ‘C’. For engineering graduates, diploma holders and ITI candidates in Tamil Nadu, this is a strong chance to join one of India’s most respected defence companies. If you are looking for PSU government jobs, do read this notification fully. Don’t worry — everything is explained in simple words.

The application is online only, and the last dates are 1 July 2026 for Trainee Engineer and 8 July 2026 for EAT and Technician posts. BEL offers good pay, job security and a respected profile. In this article on , we will cover the vacancy details, eligibility, salary, selection process, exam pattern, fees and how to apply step by step. Read till the end.

Key Highlights — BEL Chennai Recruitment 2026

BEL is a leading defence electronics manufacturer, and its Chennai Unit handles important defence projects. Here are the key points of this recruitment at a glance for every engineering job seeker.

  • Organisation: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Chennai Unit
  • Posts: Trainee Engineer-I, Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT) and Technician ‘C’
  • Total Vacancies: 16 posts
  • Salary / Pay: ₹21,500 – ₹90,000 (pay scale, post-wise)
  • Last Date to Apply: 1 July 2026 (TE) / 8 July 2026 (EAT & Technician)

BEL Chennai Vacancy Breakdown 2026

The 16 posts are spread across three categories and different disciplines. The simple table below shows the split.

Trainee Engineer-I is engaged on a temporary contract basis, while EAT and Technician ‘C’ are permanent posts with regular pay scales.

BEL Chennai Eligibility Criteria 2026

Please check the qualification and age conditions for your post carefully before applying.

Educational Qualification

  • Trainee Engineer-I (Mechanical): a 4-year B.E. / B.Tech / B.Sc (Engineering) degree in Mechanical Engineering with pass class.
  • Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): a 3-year Diploma in Engineering in Electronics or Civil, with minimum 60% marks (50% for SC / PwBD).
  • Technician ‘C’: SSLC with ITI in Electronics Mechanic plus one year apprenticeship (NAC), or SSLC with a 3-year NAC course, with minimum 60% marks (50% for SC / PwBD).
  • For EAT and Technician posts, your Tamil Nadu Employment Exchange registration must be valid and active as on 8 July 2026.

Age Limit

  • The upper age limit is 28 years as on 1 June 2026 (minimum 18 years for EAT and Technician).
  • Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC (NCL), 5 years for SC, and 10 years for Persons with Disabilities (PwBD).

What is the Salary for BEL Chennai Recruitment 2026?

The pay depends on the post. Trainee Engineer is on a fixed monthly amount, while EAT and Technician get regular pay scales.

  • Trainee Engineer-I: ₹30,000 per month in year one, ₹35,000 in year two and ₹40,000 in year three (consolidated).
  • Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): pay scale ₹24,500 – ₹90,000 with a ₹24,000 monthly stipend during the first six months of training.
  • Technician ‘C’: pay scale ₹21,500 – ₹82,000 plus allowances.

EAT and Technician posts also carry Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, perquisites, medical benefits, Provident Fund and gratuity as per BEL rules.

What is the Selection Process for BEL Chennai Recruitment 2026?

Selection is through a written test followed by document verification and medical examination. The steps are below.

  1. Submit the online application before the last date for your post.
  2. Appear for the written examination conducted at Chennai.
  3. Qualify in the written test as per the cut-off for your category.
  4. Attend document verification with all original certificates.
  5. Pass the pre-employment medical examination before joining.

BEL Chennai Exam Pattern 2026

The exam pattern is different for the two groups of posts. For detailed exam preparation help, check our site.

  • Trainee Engineer-I: a Written Test of 100 marks with negative marking of one-fourth mark per wrong answer; qualifying marks are 35% (Gen / EWS / OBC) and 30% (SC / PwBD).
  • EAT & Technician ‘C’: an OMR-based test of 150 marks — Part I General Aptitude (50 marks) and Part II Technical (100 marks); qualifying marks are 35% (Gen / OBC / EWS) and 30% (SC / PwBD) in each part.

How to for BEL Chennai Recruitment 2026?

The application is online only — no paper applications are accepted. Follow these steps.

  1. Visit the official BEL online application link (given in Essential Links below).
  2. Read the eligibility for your post and keep your documents ready.
  3. Pay the application fee online through SBI Collect (only if applicable) and note the reference number.
  4. Fill the online form with correct details and the SBI Collect reference number.
  5. Upload the required documents and submit, then keep a printout for your record.

Documents Required for Application

  • Proof of date of birth (SSLC / 10th mark sheet).
  • Degree, Diploma, ITI or NAC certificate with marks.
  • Tamil Nadu Employment Exchange registration proof (for EAT and Technician).
  • Category certificate (SC, ST, OBC-NCL, EWS or PwBD) if applicable.
  • SBI Collect payment receipt and a valid photo ID proof.

BEL Chennai Important Dates 2026

BEL Chennai Application Fees 2026

The application fee depends on the post and category, and is paid online through SBI Collect.

Essential Links — BEL Chennai Recruitment 2026

  • Page
  • Page
  • for BEL Chennai Recruitment
  • Visit BEL

This BEL Chennai recruitment is a wonderful chance to join a top defence PSU with good pay and a secure future. Check your post’s eligibility, complete your Employment Exchange registration if needed, and apply before the last date. For more PSU and engineering job updates, keep visiting daily.

title: EIL Engineers Recruitment 2026: for 41 Associate Engineer Vacancies
description: Big Career Opportunity at Engineers India Limited in 2026 Engineers India Limited (EIL), a respected Navratna PSU under the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, has released a fres
jobDescription:
Big Career Opportunity at Engineers India Limited in 2026

Engineers India Limited (EIL), a respected Navratna PSU under the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, has released a fresh recruitment notification for The company wants to hire a total of 41 experienced engineers for Associate Engineer Grade II and Grade III posts across many engineering branches. If you are an experienced engineer who dreams of working with one of India’s top engineering consultancy organisations, this is a wonderful chance for you. These are well-paid posts, and you will find similar openings on our PSU jobs page. Don’t worry — we will explain everything in very simple language.

The online application window is open from 16 June 2026 to 30 June 2026, so you must act quickly. This drive is best suited for engineers who already have a few years of relevant experience in refinery, petrochemical, gas processing or similar projects. In this article on , we will cover the vacancy details, eligibility, salary, selection process, important dates, fees and how to apply step by step. Please read till the end so you do not miss any key point.

Key Highlights — EIL Associate Engineer Recruitment 2026

EIL is a leading engineering consultancy and project management company that works on big refinery, petrochemical and oil & gas projects in India and abroad. Working here gives you strong exposure and a respected profile in the engineering field. Here are the most important points of this recruitment at a glance, useful for every engineering job aspirant.

  • Post Names: Associate Engineer Grade II and Associate Engineer Grade III
  • Total Vacancies: 41 posts
  • Salary / Pay: ₹72,000 – ₹96,000 per month (consolidated)
  • Job Location: National Capital Region (postings possible anywhere in India and abroad)
  • Last Date to Apply: 30 June 2026

EIL Associate Engineer Vacancy Breakdown 2026

The 41 posts are divided across Grade II and Grade III in different engineering disciplines. The discipline-wise vacancy table is given below so you can quickly find your branch.

This drive has 15 Grade II posts and 26 Grade III posts, which together make up all 41 vacancies. Grade II carries a consolidated monthly pay of around ₹72,000 – ₹80,000 and Grade III around ₹86,400 – ₹96,000, depending on the posting city.

EIL Associate Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026

Before applying, please make sure you meet both the education and experience conditions. These posts are for experienced engineers, not for freshers.

Educational Qualification

  • A full-time B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. (Engineering) degree in the relevant branch with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA.
  • Eligible branches include: Chemical, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Instrumentation & Electronics, Environment, and Metallurgy / Materials. If you hold any of these engineering degrees, check the matching post.
  • Experience: Grade II needs minimum 5 years and Grade III needs minimum 9 years of relevant post-qualification experience (as on 31 May 2026).

Age Limit

  • Associate Engineer Grade II: maximum 37 years.
  • Associate Engineer Grade III: maximum 41 years (both as on 31 May 2026).
  • Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (NCL), 10 years or more for Persons with Disabilities, and relaxation for Ex-Servicemen as per Government rules.

What is the Salary for EIL Associate Engineer 2026?

This is one of the biggest attractions of this recruitment. The pay is a consolidated monthly amount that already includes HRA and PF, and it changes a little based on your posting city (X, Y or Z category).

  • Associate Engineer Grade II: ₹80,000 (X cities) / ₹76,000 (Y cities) / ₹72,000 (Z cities) per month.
  • Associate Engineer Grade III: ₹96,000 (X cities) / ₹91,200 (Y cities) / ₹86,400 (Z cities) per month.

In-hand pay ranges from ₹72,000 to ₹96,000 per month, plus medical insurance reimbursement up to ₹2,00,000 per year, accident insurance cover and paid leave.

The engagement is on a Fixed Term basis for 2 years, which can be extended up to a maximum of 3 years based on performance and company need.

What is the Selection Process for EIL Associate Engineer 2026?

There is no written examination for this recruitment. Selection is based on screening and a personal (walk-in) interview. The steps are simple and given below.

  1. Complete online registration and get a valid registration number.
  2. Screening of your application and certificates on the day of the interview.
  3. Appear for the personal walk-in interview.
  4. Document verification of all original certificates.
  5. Medical fitness check before joining.

title: IDBI Bank IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 Recruitment 2026
description: IDBI Bank has released the Interview Call Letters for Junior Assistant Manager (JAM) Grade 'O' and Assistant Manager (AM) Grade 'A') posts. jobDescription:
IDBI Bank has released the IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 on its for candidates shortlisted in the online examination for Junior Assistant Manager (Grade 'O') and Assistant Manager (Grade 'A') posts. The call letter, released on 15th June 2026, is the mandatory entry pass for the Document Verification (DV) and Personal Interview (PI) round scheduled up to 25th June Candidates can download it instantly using their Registration Number/Roll Number and Password/Date of Birth on the official IDBI Bank careers portal.

This recruitment drive aims to fill 1,300 vacancies, comprising 1,100 posts for Junior Assistant Manager (Grade 'O') and 200 posts for Assistant Manager (Grade 'A'). Below is everything candidates need to know about downloading the call letter, the interview schedule, required documents, and what happens after the interview.

IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 - Quick Overview

idbibank.in

IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 Download Link

This section provides the direct link candidates can use to access the IDBI JAM admit card download portal without navigating through the 's career page.

The download link for the IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 is currently active on IDBI Bank's recruitment portal. Since the call letter is compulsory for entry into the interview and document verification round, candidates should download and print it well in advance to avoid last-minute technical glitches.

Click Here to Download IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026

How to Download IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026?

This section explains the exact step-by-step process to log in and download the admit card, which is useful for candidates who are accessing the portal for the first time.

Candidates need their Registration Number/Roll Number along with their Password or Date of Birth to log in and download the call letter. Follow these steps:

  1. Visit the official IDBI Bank website at idbibank.in.
  2. Scroll down to the homepage and click on the "Careers" section.
  3. Select the "Current Openings" option.
  4. Locate the recruitment notification for Junior Assistant Manager (JAM) Grade 'O'.
  5. Click on the link titled "Call Letter for Document Verification (DV) and Personal Interview (PI)."
  6. Enter your Registration Number/Roll Number.
  7. Enter your Password or Date of Birth (format: DD-MM-YY).
  8. Submit the details to view your call letter.
  9. Download the admit card and take a printout for future reference.

IDBI JAM Interview Date 2026

This section answers when the document verification and personal interview round is scheduled, which is one of the most searched details after the call letter release.

The IDBI JAM Document Verification and Personal Interview process is scheduled to be conducted up to 25th June 2026. The exact date, reporting time, and venue for each candidate are mentioned individually on their respective call letter, so candidates must check their own admit card carefully rather than relying on a common schedule.

Also Read: Apex Bank Assistant Admit Card 2026

Details Mentioned on the IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter

This section lists the specific information printed on the call letter so candidates know what to verify immediately after downloading it.

After downloading the admit card, candidates should cross-check every detail for accuracy. The call letter typically includes:

  • Candidate's Name
  • Roll Number and Registration Number
  • Date of Birth
  • Category
  • Post Applied For (JAM Grade 'O' / AM Grade 'A')
  • Interview Date
  • Reporting Time
  • Entry Closing Time
  • Interview Venue with Complete Address
  • Important Instructions for Candidates

If any detail appears incorrect, candidates are advised to contact IDBI Bank through the official communication channels mentioned on the website before the interview date.

Documents Required for IDBI JAM Document Verification & Interview

This section lists all original certificates and supporting documents candidates must carry to the venue, since incomplete documentation can lead to disqualification at the verification stage.

Candidates must carry the following original documents along with self-attested photocopies:

  • Interview Call Letter with photograph affixed
  • Printout of the Online Application Form
  • Date of Birth Proof (Class 10 Certificate/Birth Certificate)
  • Domicile Certificate of the applied State/Zone
  • Proof of Regional Language, if applicable (Class 10 or 12 Marksheet/Certificate)
  • Class 10 and Class 12 Marksheets and Certificates
  • Graduation Marksheets for all semesters/years
  • Provisional or Final Degree Certificate
  • SC/ST/OBC/EWS Category Certificate, if applicable
  • PwBD Certificate, if applicable
  • Experience Certificates and Relieving Letters, if applicable
  • No Objection Certificate (mandatory for candidates currently employed in Government/PSU organizations)
  • Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Passport, Voter ID, or Driving Licence)
  • Four copies of Curriculum Vitae (CV) in the prescribed format
  • Two recent passport-size photographs

Important Instructions for IDBI JAM Interview 2026

This section covers the key conduct and reporting guidelines candidates must follow on the day of the interview to avoid being turned away at the venue.

  • Reach the interview venue before the reporting time mentioned on the call letter.
  • Carry all original documents along with self-attested photocopies.
  • Verify that all details printed on the call letter are correct before the interview date.
  • Carefully follow every instruction listed on the admit card.
  • Carry recent passport-size photographs as specified.
  • Wear formal, professional attire for the interview.
  • Keep an extra printout of the call letter for your personal records.

What Happens After the IDBI JAM Interview and Document Verification?

This section explains the next stage of the selection process so candidates know what to expect once the interview and verification round is over.

Once the Document Verification and Personal Interview rounds are completed, IDBI Bank will prepare the final merit list based on a candidate's combined performance in the online examination and the personal interview, along with successful document verification. Candidates whose names appear on the final merit list will be considered eligible for appointment as Junior Assistant Manager (Grade 'O') or Assistant Manager (Grade 'A'), subject to meeting all eligibility and recruitment conditions set by IDBI Bank.

The IDBI JAM Interview Call Letter 2026 was released on 15th June 2026.

The Document Verification (DV) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds are scheduled to be conducted up to 25th June 2026.

There are a total of 1,300 vacancies, with 1,100 for Junior Assistant Manager (Grade 'O') and 200 for Assistant Manager (Grade 'A').

Candidates need their Registration Number/Roll Number along with their Password or Date of Birth to download the call letter.

Candidates must carry the Interview Call Letter, online application form printout, date of birth proof, domicile certificate, regional language proof, Class 10/12 marksheets/certificates, graduation marksheets/degree, category certificate (if applicable), experience certificates (if applicable), NOC (for employed candidates), and a valid photo ID proof.

title: CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026: for 74 Co-operative Bank Posts
description: CSEB Kerala has released Notification No. 18/2026 for 74 Junior Clerk posts in various co-operative banks and societies. Eligible candidates can by June 30, 2026, with selection based on a written test and interview
jobDescription:
Junior Clerk Jobs in Kerala Co-operative Banks 2026

The Co-operative Service Examination Board (CSEB), Kerala has released Notification No. 18/2026 to fill 74 Junior Clerk posts in various co-operative banks and societies across the state. For young people in Kerala who want a stable job close to home, working as a Junior Clerk in a co-operative bank is a respected and secure option. If you are searching for government jobs in Kerala, this notification is worth your full attention. Don’t worry — we have explained each point in very simple language.

The last date to submit the online application is 30 June 2026. Selection is done through an OMR-based written test conducted by the Board, followed by an interview at the bank. In this article on , we will cover the vacancy details, eligibility, salary, selection process, fees and how to step by step. Read till the end so you understand the full process.

Key Highlights — CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026

These Junior Clerk posts are spread across Special Grade and Class-I co-operative banks in many districts of Kerala. Here are the main points at a glance for every banking jobs aspirant.

  • Recruiting Body: Co-operative Service Examination Board (CSEB), Kerala
  • Post Name: Junior Clerk
  • Total Vacancies: 74 posts across 29 co-operative banks and societies
  • Salary / Pay: ₹12,740 – ₹45,570 (scale of pay, varies by bank)
  • Last Date to Apply: 30 June 2026

CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Vacancy Breakdown 2026

The 74 posts are spread across 10 districts. The district-wise split is shown in the simple table below.

Some posts are reserved for SC/ST and Persons with Disabilities in specific banks, as mentioned in the . Candidates can apply for more than one bank or society.

CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Eligibility Criteria 2026

Please check the education and age conditions carefully before applying, as the qualification rules for co-operative posts are a little different.

Educational Qualification

  • SSLC (10th) or equivalent qualification, along with the Junior Diploma in Co-operation (JDC) / Subordinate Personnel Co-operative Training Course.
  • Candidates with B.Com with Co-operation, any degree from a recognised University, the Higher Diploma in Co-operation (HDC / HDC & BM), or B.Sc (Co-operation & Banking) from Kerala Agricultural University are also eligible.
  • A 10th-pass with the required co-operative training can apply, which makes this open to many candidates.

Age Limit

  • Candidates must have completed 18 years and must not have completed 40 years as on 1 January 2026.
  • Age relaxation: SC/ST and widows get relaxation as per rules, Persons with Disabilities (40% or more) get 10 years, and OBC / EWS / Ex-Servicemen get relaxation as per Kerala Government norms.

What is the Salary for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026?

The pay scale depends on the specific co-operative bank or society, as each institution has its own scale. Most posts fall in the higher range.

  • Common scales are ₹16,890 – ₹43,660 and ₹17,360 – ₹44,650 per month.
  • A few banks offer up to ₹17,590 – ₹45,570, while one society starts at ₹12,740 – ₹34,320.

Along with the basic scale of pay, employees receive Dearness Allowance and other benefits as per the co-operative bank’s service rules.

What is the Selection Process for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026?

Selection is by direct recruitment based on the Board’s written test and an interview at the institution. The steps are simple.

  1. Submit the online application for one or more banks within the last date.
  2. Appear for the OMR-based written examination conducted by CSEB.
  3. Attend the interview at the concerned co-operative bank or society.
  4. Final ranked list is prepared and candidates are appointed to the banks.

CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Exam Pattern

The written examination is an OMR-based test of 100 marks with 100 questions, each carrying one mark. After the written test, eligible candidates attend an interview worth 20 marks — a candidate gets a minimum of 4 marks just for attending, and the remaining 16 marks are based on the interview performance. You can review general exam preparation tips on our site.

How to for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026?

The application is fully online through the CSEB website. Follow these steps before the last date.

  1. Visit the official CSEB candidate login portal (link given in Essential Links below).
  2. Candidates who have not done one-time registration must complete it first.
  3. Already registered candidates can log in with their profile and .
  4. Fill the form, choose the bank(s) you want to apply for, and pay the fee online.
  5. Submit the application and take a printout from the “My Application” section.

Documents Required for Application

  • SSLC (10th) certificate as proof of date of birth.
  • Junior Diploma in Co-operation (JDC) / degree / HDC certificate as applicable.
  • Category certificate (SC, ST, OBC or EWS) if claiming relaxation.
  • PwD certificate if applying under that category.
  • Recent passport-size photograph and signature in the required format.

CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Important Dates 2026

CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Application Fees 2026

Candidates must pay the examination fee plus 18% GST online while submitting the form. The fee depends on category and the number of banks chosen.

Essential Links — CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026

  • Page
  • at CSEB Candidate Login
  • Visit CSEB

This CSEB recruitment is a great chance for Kerala candidates to get a secure clerk job in a co-operative bank near their home. If you have the required qualification, apply early and prepare well for the OMR test before 30 June 2026. For more Kerala government job notifications, keep visiting every day.

📋 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

❓ What are the eligibility criteria for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026?

Candidates must have SSLC (10th) with Junior Diploma in Co-operation (JDC) or equivalent, OR a B.Com with Co-operation, OR any degree. The age limit is 18-40 years as on January 1, 2026.

❓ What is the last date to apply for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk posts?

The last date to submit the online application for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 is June 30, 2026.

❓ What is the salary for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk?

The salary for Junior Clerk posts varies by bank, with scales ranging from ₹12,740 to ₹45,570 per month, plus other allowances.

❓ What is the selection process for CSEB Kerala Junior Clerk 2026?

The selection process involves an OMR-based written examination of 100 marks conducted by CSEB, followed by an interview worth 20 marks at the concerned co-operative bank or society.

jobDescription:

Research Centre Imarat (RCI), Hyderabad, a premier laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), has invited applications for the Paid Internship 2026 (Advertisement No. RCI/HRD/PDINTERN/2026/01) for final year Under-Graduate and Post-Graduate students in Engineering and Science disciplines.

Total 160 paid internship positions are available at RCI/DYSL-AT/DSP for a minimum period of 6 months. This is an excellent opportunity for meritorious students to work on cutting-edge avionics and missile defence technologies.

✅ NTPC Advt No. 08/2026 Remuneration

Selected candidates will be engaged on a fixed-term basis with the following consolidated monthly remuneration:

  • Posts A & B (Senior Executive): ₹1,90,000/- per month (Consolidated)
    Additionally: Company accommodation / HRA, Retention benefit, and medical facility for self, spouse, dependent parents and two children.
  • Posts C & D (Executive): ₹1,50,000/- per month (Consolidated)
    Additionally: Company accommodation / HRA, Retention benefit, and medical facility for self, spouse, dependent parents and two children.

✅ NTPC Advt No. 08/2026 Eligibility Criteria

Post A: Senior Executive (Material & Supply Chain Management) – 01 Post

Qualification: Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. MBA qualification will be an added advantage.

Experience Requirement:

  • Minimum 22 years post-qualification executive experience including 15 years’ experience in Material Management / Supply Chain Management.
  • Out of 22 years, minimum 10 years’ experience should be in Power / Energy sector.
  • Candidates with global exposure will be preferred.

Post B: Senior Executive (Green Chemical) – 01 Post

Qualification: Degree in Engineering from a recognized University.

Experience Requirement: Minimum 22 years post-qualification executive experience, out of which minimum 15 years’ experience in design and development, project planning and execution of ammonia and/or methanol plants / other Green Chemical Projects or related areas.

Post C: Executive (Regulatory Affairs-Nuclear) – 01 Post

Qualification: Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. MBA qualification will be an added advantage.

Experience Requirement: Minimum 15 years of post-qualification executive experience (including training period, if any) in nuclear power projects, out of which minimum 10 years should be in regulatory bodies, preparation of regulatory documents, coordination with AERB, replying to regulatory queries, and obtaining regulatory clearances for Nuclear Power Projects.

Post D: Executive (Engineering-Nuclear) – 01 Post

Qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University. MBA qualification will be an added advantage.

Experience Requirement: Minimum 15 years of post-qualification executive experience (including training period, if any) in Civil engineering of nuclear power projects, out of which minimum 10 years should be in Civil engineering of nuclear island.

Upper Age Limit (as on last date of application): Posts A & B – 55 years | Posts C & D – 50 years

Tenure: 1 year with provision for further extension up to 2 years based on organizational requirement and performance.

  1. Application Shortlisting / Screening (based on qualification, experience, etc.)
  2. Written / Computer-Based Test (if required by management)
  3. Personal Interview
  4. Document Verification & Medical Examination

Note: Mere fulfillment of minimum eligibility criteria does not guarantee shortlisting or selection. NTPC reserves the right to conduct multi-stage selection process.

  • Women candidates, SC, ST, PwBD and Ex-Servicemen : Exempted (No fee)

  3. Fill the online application form carefully
  4. Upload all required documents (scanned copies)
  5. Pay the application fee (if applicable)
  6. Submit the form and download the Application Slip for future reference

  • Engineering Degree – Final/Provisional Certificate
  • Engineering consolidated Marksheet / Transcript showing aggregate percentage
  • MBA/PGDM Certificate & Marksheet (if applicable)

title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026
description: Mizoram Government UDC Vacancy 2026: MPSC Limited Departmental Exam The Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released a notification for 18 Upper Division Clerk (UDC) posts...
jobDescription:
Mizoram Government UDC Vacancy 2026: MPSC Limited Departmental Exam

The Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released a notification for 18 Upper Division Clerk (UDC) posts in the Health & Family Welfare Department. Please note an important point right at the start: this is a Limited Departmental Examination (LDE), which means it is open only to serving Mizoram Government employees working in the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) grade. It is not an open recruitment for the general public.

The posts are classified as Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted) and carry Pay Level 6 in the pay matrix — a good promotion opportunity for eligible departmental staff. The last date to apply online is 24 July 2026. In this article from GovtJobsAlert.in, we explain the eligibility, pay, exam process and application steps in very simple language. If you are a serving LDC in Mizoram, read on carefully — this could be your route to promotion. For other openings, see our Mizoram government jobs page.

Key Highlights — Mizoram PSC UDC Recruitment 2026

The Mizoram Public Service Commission conducts departmental examinations to promote in-service employees to higher posts. This UDC examination is for the Health & Family Welfare Department and is a valuable chance for eligible LDC staff to move up. Many graduate-level government roles follow this kind of departmental path.

  • Conducting Body: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC)
  • Department: Health & Family Welfare
  • Post Name: Upper Division Clerk (UDC) — Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted)
  • Total Posts: 18
  • Pay Level: Pay Level 6 in the Pay Matrix
  • Last Date to Apply: 24 July 2026

Vacancy and Post Details — Mizoram PSC UDC 2026

This is a single-post examination with a healthy number of vacancies. Here are the key details:

The examination is conducted under the Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules. With 18 posts on offer, there is a fair chance for eligible departmental candidates, so it is worth preparing seriously. The pay and Group ‘B’ classification together make this a meaningful step up for serving clerical staff who have put in their qualifying years of service.

Eligibility Criteria — Mizoram PSC UDC 2026

Who Can Apply

This is the most important part. The examination is strictly departmental:

  • The candidate must be a serving officer in the LDC grade in the Mizoram Government.
  • Under the Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2011: at least 5 years of regular service in the LDC grade.
  • Under the Mizoram Ministerial Service Rules, 2021: at least 7 years of regular service in the LDC grade after regular appointment.

Candidates from the general public who are not already serving as LDC are not eligible to .

Other Conditions

The qualifying service is counted as per the relevant rules, and candidates must provide service records to prove their eligibility. Any candidate found not meeting the service conditions at any stage will be disqualified.

What is the Salary for Mizoram PSC UDC 2026?

The Upper Division Clerk post carries Pay Level 6 in the pay matrix, which is a respectable pay grade for a Group ‘B’ (Non-Gazetted) clerical post.

Pay Level 6 generally ranges around ₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400 per month under the pay matrix, along with the usual government allowances.

For serving LDC staff, this is a clear pay and status upgrade. Exact pay and allowances will be as per the Mizoram Government rules applicable at the time of promotion.

What is the Selection Process for Mizoram PSC UDC 2026?

Selection is through a Limited Departmental Examination conducted by MPSC. The steps are:

  1. Online application with the required service documents uploaded.
  2. Written departmental examination as per the prescribed syllabus.
  3. Verification of service records and eligibility of qualified candidates.

Since this is a departmental promotion exam, the questions usually focus on office procedure, clerical duties, general knowledge and the service rules relevant to your work. Eligible candidates should revise the official syllabus carefully and practise the expected pattern well before the exam day. The detailed syllabus for the examination is available for download on the official MPSC website. You can also browse our exam syllabus and preparation guide for general help.

How to Apply for Mizoram PSC UDC 2026?

Eligible serving candidates must apply online through the MPSC online portal. Follow these steps:

  1. Complete the one-time registration on the MPSC online portal (if not already registered).
  2. Log in and open the UDC Limited Departmental Examination form.
  3. Fill in your service and personal details correctly.
  4. Upload all the required service documents before the last date.
  5. Pay the application fee online and submit the form.
  6. Confirm that your application is submitted successfully after payment.

Documents Required for Application

The following documents must be uploaded before the last date:

  • Service Book entry showing the date of joining the feeder (LDC) post
  • Service Book entry showing the date of birth
  • Confirmation Order
  • Certification by the Head of Department or Cadre Authority in the prescribed format

Important Dates — Mizoram PSC UDC 2026

Application Fees — Mizoram PSC UDC 2026

The application fee is paid online (UPI/online modes). Persons with Disabilities are exempted from the fee. The fee, once paid, is non-refundable. For the exact fee amount, please check the official notification on the MPSC portal.

Essential Links — Mizoram PSC UDC 2026

  • Official Notification Page
  • Apply Online for Mizoram PSC UDC 2026
  • Visit MPSC Official Online Portal

This Mizoram PSC UDC 2026 examination is a valuable promotion chance for serving LDC staff in the Health & Family Welfare Department. If you meet the service condition, prepare well and apply before 24 July 2026. For more Mizoram government job and exam updates, keep visiting GovtJobsAlert.in. We wish all eligible candidates the very best!
