J&K Domicile candidates – SC/ST (Group C only) 10 years
Widows / Divorced Women / Judicially Separated Women (UR) Up to 35 years
Widows / Divorced Women / Judicially Separated Women (OBC) Up to 38 years
Widows / Divorced Women / Judicially Separated Women (SC/ST) Up to 40 years

Note: SC/ST/OBC candidates applying for unreserved vacancies are not entitled to age relaxation. AIIMS New Delhi, AIIMS-CAPFIMS, LHMC & associated hospitals, ICMR, and Pasteur Institute of India follow Central Government service conditions only for the age relaxation benefit to existing employees.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

The application fee is charged per group applied. Candidates applying to multiple groups must pay separately for each group.

Category Fee
General / OBC ₹3,000
SC / ST / EWS ₹2,400
Persons with Disabilities (PwBD) Exempted

Payment can be made via Debit Card, Credit Card, or Net Banking. The examination fee is non-refundable under any circumstances, even if the application is rejected for ineligibility. However, application fees paid by SC/ST candidates who appear in the examination will be refunded to the source account after declaration of results.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Exam Pattern and Syllabus

The CRE-5 Computer Based Test is a structured, time-bound examination designed to assess both domain knowledge and general aptitude.

CBT Structure

Parameter Detail
Duration 90 minutes
Total Questions 100 MCQs
Total Marks 400 marks (4 marks per question)
Negative Marking –1 mark per wrong answer (1/4th deduction)
General Knowledge & Aptitude / Computer 20 MCQs
Domain-Specific Questions 80 MCQs
Sections 5 sections × 20 questions × 18 minutes each

Each section is sequential and time-locked - once a section closes, candidates cannot return to it. Candidates must attempt all possible questions within the active section's time window.

Medium of Examination

Posts where the essential qualification is 10th/12th will be examined in bilingual (English and Hindi) medium. Posts requiring bachelor's or higher qualifications, or posts involving specific technical domain knowledge, will be examined in English only.

Qualifying Marks

Category Qualifying Percentage
UR / EWS 40%
OBC 35%
SC / ST 30%
PwBD (all categories) 30%
Ex-Servicemen As per their category

Tie-Breaking Rules

In case of equal marks, ties are resolved in this order: (i) higher marks in the domain-specific section; (ii) fewer wrong answers/negative marks; (iii) older date of birth; (iv) alphabetical order of name, then father's name, then mother's name.

Syllabus (Domain Part - Selected Groups)

Group Domain Syllabus
1 Food & Nutrition, Diets
2 General Administration, CCS Rules, FR/SR, Basic Computer
3 General Maths & English
4 Civil Engineering
5 Electrical Engineering
12 Pharmacy
17 Medical Laboratory Technology
34 Nursing
41 Computer Applications and Programming
53 General Maths, English, Fire Safety and Security

Full syllabus details for all 57 groups are in Section IX of the official DRA.

Skill Test

For selected post groups, a Skill Test is conducted as Stage II for candidates who qualify the CBT. The skill test is qualifying in nature. The final merit list is prepared based on CBT performance, but only among those who pass the skill test for the relevant post.

Posts requiring skill tests include groups such as Junior Administrative Assistant (typing test), Stenographer (stenography test), Programmer (computer skill test), Hindi Translator (translation test), Assistant Security Officer (PST), and Fire Technician (PET & PST). See Annexure-V of the DRA for complete scheme details.

If a candidate qualifies the CBT but fails the skill test, they remain eligible only for posts within the same group that do not require a skill test.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

CRE-5 follows a multi-stage recruitment process. Each stage is mandatory for progression to the next.

Stage 1 - Online Application: Candidates register on www.aiimsexams.ac.in and submit applications by 30 June 2026.

Stage 2 - Application Acceptance: Application status published on 9 July 2026.

Stage 3 - Computer Based Test (CBT): Tentatively 25–27 July 2026 at examination centres across major states/UTs of India.

Stage 4 - Skill Test (where applicable): Conducted after CBT for qualifying candidates in applicable groups. Venue: preferably Delhi/NCR. Date to be notified.

Stage 5 - Choice & Preference: Qualified candidates are invited to exercise institute choices and indicate order of preference. Candidates who fail to exercise choices within the given period will not be considered for any institute.

Stage 6 - Seat Allocation: Allocation is made in order of merit based on choices exercised and eligibility at each participating institute.

Stage 7 - Document Verification: Original certificates verified by the respective AIIMS/Institute on the date notified by them.

Stage 8 - Joining: Selected candidates must report on the date specified in the result/allocation notice. Failure to report will lead to mandatory cancellation of candidature for CRE.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale

Pay scales follow the 7th Pay Commission Pay Matrix. Specific pay levels differ by post and institute.

Pay Level Approximate Basic Pay Posts (Examples)
Pay Level 1 ₹18,000/month Hospital Attendant Grade III, Nursing Attendant, OT Attendant, Dresser, Cook
Pay Level 2 ₹19,900/month Junior Administrative Assistant, LDC, Wireman, Lineman
Pay Level 3 ₹21,700/month Library Attendant Grade II
Pay Level 4 ₹25,500/month Cashier, Dispensing Attendant, Data Entry Operator Grade A, Electrician, Assistant Laundry Supervisor
Pay Level 5 ₹29,200/month Warden (RHTC), Pharmacist, Technologist (OT), Junior Medical Lab Technologist, Operation Theatre Assistant, Manifold Technician (Gas Steward)
Pay Level 6 ₹35,400/month Assistant Dietician, Junior Administrative Officer, Assistant (ICMR), Junior Engineer (Civil/Electrical), Store Keeper, Junior Accounts Officer, Technical Assistant (OT/MLT)
Pay Level 7 ₹44,900/month Dietician, Assistant Engineer (Civil/Electrical/AC&R), Librarian Grade I

In addition to basic pay, posts carry allowances (HRA, DA, TA, etc.) as per the rules applicable at each respective institute.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply for AIIMS CRE-5 2026

Applications can only be submitted through the Online Registration Terminal (OTR) at www.aiimsexams.ac.in. Physical documents must not be sent; no correspondence regarding correction in registration will be entertained.

  1. Visit the : www.aiimsexams.ac.in
  2. Register through the OTR (One-Time Registration) portal if you have not already done so.
  3. Log in and select the CRE-5 application .
  4. Fill in all details carefully - name, date of birth, category, qualification, experience, and NOC details if applicable.
  5. Upload photographs, signature, and left thumb impression in the format specified under "Upload Image Instructions."
  6. Select your examination centre preference (state/UT).
  7. Pay the applicable examination fee via Debit Card, Credit Card, or Net Banking.
  8. Submit the application and download the registration slip for your records.
  9. If you are working in a Government/PSU/Autonomous Body, upload the No Objection Certificate (NOC) from your current employer by 6 July 2026 - failing to do so will prevent you from appearing in the examination.
  10. Check your application status on 9 July 2026 at www.aiimsexams.ac.in.

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Required Documents and Certificates

Candidates must have all certificates ready at the time of applying, as no additional time will be granted at document verification. Documents required include:

  • Downloaded Registration Slip and Admit Card
  • Date of Birth certificate (Matriculation certificate or equivalent)
  • Category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) - valid and current; OBC NCL certificate must be valid for Financial Year 2026-27 (issued on or after 01 April 2026)
  • EWS certificate issued between 01 April 2026 and 30 June 2026
  • Disability certificate (for PwBD candidates, with minimum 40% benchmark disability)
  • No Objection Certificate from current employer (for Govt./PSU/Autonomous Body employees)
  • Educational qualification certificates
  • Experience certificates mentioning dates, basic pay, and nature of duties
  • Any other certificate required by the respective institute

AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

Resource Link
(DRA) Click Here
Apply Here
www.aiimsexams.ac.in
AIIMS New Delhi www.aiims.edu

title: GSSSB AAE (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026: for 110 Additional Assistant Engineer Posts
description: GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) 2026: 110 Posts, Eligibility & Here is a great opportunity for diploma engineers in Gujarat. The Gujarat Subordinate S
jobDescription:
GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) 2026: 110 Posts, Eligibility &

Here is a great opportunity for diploma engineers in Gujarat. The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has released a notification for 110 posts of Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3. If you hold a diploma in Mechanical or Automobile Engineering, this is your chance to get a respected Class-3 government engineering job in Gujarat. The recruitment is being held under Advertisement No. 419/2026-27, and after a fixed-pay period the post settles into the attractive Pay Level-7 scale.

The online application through the OJAS portal is open from 15 June 2026, and the last date to apply is 29 June 2026. The application window is short, so do not delay. This is a fantastic opening for those looking for engineering government jobs in Gujarat. In this article we will explain the vacancies, eligibility, salary, exam pattern, fees and the steps to . Read it carefully and keep saved for every update.

Key Highlights — GSSSB AAE Mechanical Recruitment 2026

The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board conducts recruitment for various Class-3 posts in the Gujarat government. This recruitment is for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) post under the Water Resources / Water Supply department.

  • Post Name: Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3
  • Total Vacancies: 110 posts
  • Pay: ₹49,600 fixed (first 5 years), then Pay Level-7 (₹39,900 – ₹1,26,600)
  • Job Location: Gujarat
  • Application Dates: 15 June 2026 to 29 June 2026
  • Advertisement No.: 419/2026-27

This is an excellent post for diploma holders seeking government jobs in the engineering field.

Vacancy Breakdown — GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026

There are 110 posts in total, distributed across the reservation categories as shown below.

Within these 110 posts, there is horizontal reservation of 36 posts for women and 11 posts for Ex-Servicemen. Posts reserved for Persons with Disabilities are advertised separately under Advt. No. 421/2026-27.

Eligibility Criteria — GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026

Please check your qualification and age carefully before applying. This post is ideal for diploma-level engineering candidates.

Educational Qualification

  • A Diploma in Mechanical Engineering OR a Diploma in Automobile Engineering from a recognised Technical Examination Board or University.
  • Basic knowledge of computer applications as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Rules.
  • Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

Age Limit

  • Minimum age: 18 years
  • Maximum age: 33 years (as on 29 June 2026)
  • Age relaxation: extra years for women, reserved categories, PwBD and Ex-Servicemen as per Gujarat government rules.

What is the Salary for GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026?

The salary for this post comes in two stages, as per Gujarat government rules.

  • First 5 years: a fixed monthly pay of ₹49,600.
  • After 5 years: regular pay scale of Pay Level-7 (₹39,900 – ₹1,26,600), plus allowances.

During the initial 5-year period you receive a fixed pay of ₹49,600 per month, after which you move to the full Level-7 scale with Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance and other benefits.

This makes the post both stable and financially rewarding over the long term, along with the job security of a Gujarat government position. A Gujarat government job also offers a healthy work-life balance, regular promotions and the pride that comes with serving the people of the state, which makes this Class-3 engineering role a strong long-term career choice.

What is the Selection Process for GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026?

The selection is based on a single competitive written examination (CBRT / OMR) followed by document verification. The exam pattern is as follows.

Exam Pattern

  1. Part-A (90 marks, 90 questions): Reasoning & Data Interpretation, Quantitative Aptitude, Constitution of India, Current Affairs, and Gujarati & English language.
  2. Part-B (120 marks, 120 questions): Mechanical Engineering subject questions.

Together, Part-A and Part-B carry 210 marks for 210 questions in 3 hours (180 minutes). There is negative marking of 0.25 mark per wrong answer, and candidates must secure a minimum of 40% in each part to qualify.

Document Verification

Candidates roughly twice the number of vacancies are called for document verification based on merit, after which the final merit list is prepared. You can review the exam syllabus and preparation tips while you prepare.

How to for GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026?

The application is online only through the OJAS portal. Keep your documents ready and follow these steps.

  1. Visit the OJAS portal (link in Essential Links below).
  2. Under “”, select GSSSB and then the AAE (Mechanical), Advt. No. 419/2026-27 post.
  3. Read the details, click , and fill your personal and educational details.
  4. Upload your photograph and signature in the prescribed size.
  5. Confirm your application to generate the confirmation number.
  6. Take a printout and pay the examination fee online by 1 July 2026.

GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026 Important Dates

Note these important dates carefully — the window is short.

GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026 Application Fee

The fee is paid online and is refundable for candidates who actually appear in the examination.

The fee is paid online through debit card, net banking, UPI or wallet (a small transaction charge applies). The fee is refunded to candidates who appear in the exam.

Essential Links — GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026

  • Page
  • for GSSSB AAE Mechanical 2026
  • Visit GSSSB

A Class-3 government engineering job in Gujarat is a great career for any diploma holder. With 110 posts on offer, this is a strong opportunity — but remember, the last date to apply is 29 June 2026, so apply early on OJAS. Do not miss this chance to serve and grow with the Gujarat government. Keep visiting for more Gujarat government job updates and notifications.

title: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026: for 50 Posts
description: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk & Junior Storekeeper 2026: 50 Posts, Eligibility & Good news for the youth of Sikkim. The Sikkim Public Service Commission (SPSC) has release
jobDescription:
Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk & Junior Storekeeper 2026: 50 Posts, Eligibility &

Good news for the youth of Sikkim. The Sikkim Public Service Commission (SPSC) has released a notification to recruit 50 candidates for the post of Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper in the Sikkim Subordinate Accounts Service. If you have passed Class XII and have basic computer knowledge, this is a great chance to get a stable state government job close to home. The post comes under Pay Matrix Level-7, which means a strong and secure salary.

Please note one important point — this recruitment is only for local candidates of Sikkim who hold a Sikkim Subject Certificate (SSC) or Certificate of Identification (COI). The online application is open and the last date to apply is 31 July 2026. This is a valuable opportunity for those looking for government jobs in Sikkim. In this article we will cover the vacancies, eligibility, salary, selection process and how to . Read it fully and keep handy for every update.

Key Highlights — Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026

The Sikkim Public Service Commission conducts recruitment for various state government posts. This time it is filling 50 Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper posts under the Finance Department of the Government of Sikkim.

  • Post Name: Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper
  • Total Vacancies: 50 posts
  • Pay Level: Pay Matrix Level-7 (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400)
  • Job Location: Sikkim
  • Eligibility: Local candidates of Sikkim only (SSC / COI holders)
  • Last Date to Apply: 31 July 2026

This is an ideal post for candidates with a 12th pass qualification who want to build a career in government accounts.

Vacancy Breakdown — Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026

There are 50 posts in total, distributed across the reservation categories of the state as shown below.

Within these posts, there is horizontal reservation for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (4 posts), Sports Persons & Artisans of Excellence (3 posts), Ex-Servicemen (2 posts) and Paramilitary Forces & Assam Rifles (1 post).

Eligibility Criteria — Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026

Please read the eligibility very carefully, as this recruitment has a special local candidate requirement. Those interested in commerce and finance government jobs will find this post very suitable.

Educational Qualification

  • Class XII passed or equivalent from any recognised Board, with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class X.
  • Knowledge of basic computer applications, with a certificate / diploma of at least 3 months in computer application (or a higher computer qualification).

Local & Other Requirements

  • Must hold a valid Sikkim Subject Certificate (SSC) or Certificate of Identification (COI).
  • Must possess a valid Local Employment Card issued by the Government of Sikkim.
  • Must be able to read, write and speak one of the State languages and be familiar with local customs.

Age Limit

  • Minimum age: 18 years
  • Maximum age: 40 years (as on 31 July 2026)

What is the Salary for Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026?

The post is placed in Pay Matrix Level-7 under the Sikkim Subordinate Accounts Service, which offers a comfortable and secure salary.

  • Pay Level: Level-7 (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400)
  • Starting Basic Pay: ₹35,400
  • Plus Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance and other state government benefits.

Including allowances, the approximate in-hand salary is generally around ₹45,000 to ₹50,000 per month at the starting stage, depending on the place of posting.

During the probation / training period, the pay is governed by the rules of the Government of Sikkim. The exact pay is confirmed at the time of appointment.

What is the Selection Process for Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026?

The selection is based on a written examination followed by document verification. The stages are as follows.

  1. Written Examination — an objective test as per the scheme given in Appendix-I of the notification (the detailed pattern and syllabus are available on the SPSC website).
  2. Document Scrutiny / Verification — candidates who qualify the written exam are called to submit and verify their original documents.

Admission to all stages is provisional and subject to fulfilling the eligibility conditions. Please download the detailed syllabus from the before you start your preparation.

How to for Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026?

The application is online only, and any other mode will be rejected. Keep your documents ready and follow these steps.

  1. Visit the official SPSC website (link in Essential Links below) and read the instructions carefully.
  2. Register and fill the online application form with correct details.
  3. Keep your SSC / COI, Local Employment Card and category certificate ready for upload or future verification.
  4. Pay the application fee of ₹200 online through net banking or debit/credit card.
  5. Submit the application before 31 July 2026.
  6. Download the E-Admit Card later when the Commission publishes a notice on its website.

Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026 Important Dates

Note these important dates so you apply on time.

Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026 Application Fee

The application fee is the same for all candidates and is paid online.

The fee must be paid online through net banking or a credit/debit card (Visa/MasterCard). The amount once paid is non-refundable.

Essential Links — Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026

  • Page
  • for Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk 2026
  • Visit SPSC

A state government accounts job with a Level-7 salary is a wonderful start for any young candidate in Sikkim. If you are a local candidate who has passed Class XII, this is your chance — get your documents ready and before 31 July 2026. Do not miss this opportunity to serve your own state. Keep visiting for more Sikkim government job updates and notifications.

title: CSU Teaching & Other Academic Posts Recruitment 2026: for 90 Professor & Assistant Professor Posts
description: Central Sanskrit University 2026: 90 Teaching Vacancies, Eligibility & Great news for all Sanskrit scholars and aspiring teachers across India. The Central Sanskrit Un
jobDescription:
Central Sanskrit University 2026: 90 Teaching Vacancies, Eligibility &

Great news for all Sanskrit scholars and aspiring teachers across India. The Central Sanskrit University (CSU) has announced recruitment for 90 teaching and academic posts, including Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Assistant Director (Physical Education) and Assistant Librarian. If your dream is to teach at a respected central university and shape young minds, this is a golden moment for your career. The posts carry excellent 7th Pay Commission salaries going up to ₹2,17,100 per month.

The online application window is open from 10 June 2026 to 10 July 2026. This recruitment covers many subjects such as Sahitya, Vyakarana, Vedanta, Jyotisha, Shiksha Shastra, Computer Science and Ayurveda. It is a fantastic chance for candidates seeking teaching and faculty jobs in the government sector. In this guide we will cover the posts, eligibility, salary, selection process, fees and the steps to . Read it carefully and keep bookmarked for every update.

Key Highlights — CSU Teaching & Academic Posts Recruitment 2026

The Central Sanskrit University is a premier central university dedicated to Sanskrit education and research, with campuses in different parts of the country. Through Advertisement No. 04/2026, it is filling academic posts across its Schools of Studies.

  • Post Names: Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Assistant Director (Physical Education), Assistant Librarian
  • Total Vacancies: 90 posts
  • Salary / Pay Level: ₹57,700 – ₹2,17,100 (Academic Level-10 and Level-13A)
  • Job Location: Central Sanskrit University campuses (multiple locations)
  • Application Start Date: 10 June 2026
  • Last Date to : 10 July 2026

This is a strong opportunity for every postgraduate aiming for a government career in academics.

Vacancy Breakdown — CSU Recruitment 2026

The 90 posts are divided across four categories of academic positions, spread over many Sanskrit and allied subjects.

These posts cover subjects like Sahitya, Vyakarana, Vedanta, Jyotisha, Mimamsa, Nyaya, Bauddha Darshan, Shiksha Shastra (Education), Computer Science, Yogic Sciences and Ayurveda. The exact subject-wise and category-wise break-up is given in the PDF.

Eligibility Criteria — CSU Recruitment 2026

The eligibility is fixed strictly as per UGC Regulations and the rules of the University. Detailed subject-wise qualifications are given in Annexure-I of the , so please read it for your exact subject.

Educational Qualification

  • Assistant Professor: A Master’s degree in the relevant subject with the required marks, along with NET / SET / SLET or a PhD as per UGC norms.
  • Associate Professor: A PhD in the relevant subject with the prescribed teaching/research experience and publications as per UGC norms.
  • Assistant Director (Physical Education) & Assistant Librarian: Qualifications as prescribed by UGC for these posts.

Candidates with postgraduate and higher qualifications should check Annexure-I for the exact subject requirements.

Age Limit

  • There is no fixed maximum age mentioned for these academic posts.
  • Age and relaxation are governed by UGC Regulations and Government of India norms.

What is the Salary for CSU Recruitment 2026?

The posts come under the 7th Pay Commission academic pay levels, which offer strong starting pay and growth.

  • Assistant Professor / Assistant Director / Assistant Librarian: Academic Level-10 (₹57,700 – ₹1,82,400)
  • Associate Professor: Academic Level-13A (₹1,31,400 – ₹2,17,100)

Including Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance and other benefits, the in-hand salary for an Assistant Professor starts comfortably above ₹75,000 per month, and is even higher for an Associate Professor.

Apart from pay, you also get the prestige of a central university post, research opportunities and a secure academic career.

What is the Selection Process for CSU Recruitment 2026?

The selection method depends on the post you apply for. The stages are explained below.

Associate Professor

There is no written examination. Selection is done through shortlisting as per UGC criteria, an assessment (video / PPT presentation and research skill evaluation) and a personal interview.

Assistant Professor & Other Posts

An OMR-based written test may be conducted for shortlisting if there are enough candidates for a subject, followed by an assessment and interview. Examination centres are planned at Delhi, Mumbai/Pune, Kolkata and Bengaluru. You can check the general exam pattern and syllabus guidance while you wait for details.

How to for CSU Recruitment 2026?

The application is online through the University recruitment portal, followed by sending a signed hard copy by post. Follow these steps carefully.

  1. Visit the official recruitment portal (link in Essential Links below) and register once to get your login.
  2. Select the post and subject you want to apply for.
  3. Fill the online application form and upload your photograph, signature, certificates and publications.
  4. Pay the application fee online (a separate fee is needed for each post/subject).
  5. Submit the form before 10 July 2026, 11:30 PM.
  6. Take a printout and send the signed hard copy with self-attested documents by registered post to the Registrar within 15 days of the last date.
  7. In-service candidates must apply through proper channel with an NOC.

CSU Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Keep track of these key dates so you complete every step in time.

CSU Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

The fee depends on the post level and your category, and is paid online for each post applied.

The General fee applies to UR, OBC and EWS candidates, while the Reserved fee applies to SC, ST, Women and PwBD candidates. The fee must be paid online through the application portal, and a separate application and fee is required for each subject or post.

Essential Links — CSU Recruitment 2026

  • Page
  • for CSU Recruitment 2026
  • Visit Central Sanskrit University

A teaching post at the Central Sanskrit University is a proud and stable career for any scholar. With 90 posts open across many subjects, there is a real opportunity here for you. If you meet the UGC eligibility, prepare your documents and before 10 July 2026 — and do not forget to send the hard copy in time. Keep visiting for more teaching and faculty job updates and notifications.

title: RBI Young Professional Recruitment 2026: Apply for 12 Posts, Stipend ₹1,50,000 Per Month
description: RBI Young Professional 2026: Stipend, Eligibility & Selection Explained The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released a special notification to engage 12 Young Professionals across
jobDescription:
RBI Young Professional 2026: Stipend, Eligibility & Selection Explained

The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released a special notification to engage 12 Young Professionals across its key departments. If you are a bright postgraduate or technical graduate who wants to work at the heart of India’s banking and financial system, this is a wonderful chance to learn from the best. Each selected candidate gets a generous fixed stipend of ₹1,50,000 per month, making it one of the most rewarding short-term roles in the country. These are specialised roles in fields like Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, Climate Risk and Financial Markets.

Please remember that this is a contract engagement, not a permanent RBI job. The engagement is initially for 3 years and can be extended up to a total of 5 years. Applications must reach the Bank by 6 July 2026, and there is no application fee. In this guide on banking and RBI jobs, we will explain the posts, eligibility, stipend, selection process and the exact steps to . Read it carefully so you do not miss any detail. Keep open as your trusted source.

Key Highlights — RBI Young Professional Recruitment 2026

The Reserve Bank of India is the country’s central bank and banking regulator. Through this engagement, RBI wants young, talented minds to support its research and policy work in modern, fast-changing areas. This is a fantastic learning platform for those who love technology, data, economics and public policy.

  • Post Name: Young Professional (12 different specialised roles)
  • Total Vacancies: 12 posts (1 post in each area)
  • Stipend: ₹1,50,000 per month (fixed, consolidated)
  • Engagement Type: Contract — 3 years, extendable up to 5 years
  • Job Location: Mumbai
  • Last Date to Apply: 6 July 2026

If you are a postgraduate looking for government opportunities, keep reading to check which role matches your degree.

Vacancy Breakdown — RBI Young Professional 2026

There are 12 posts in total, one in each specialised area. Each role belongs to a different RBI department, so you can pick the one that fits your qualification and interest.

Eligibility Criteria — RBI Young Professional 2026

Each of the 12 roles needs a different qualification, so please match your degree to the right post before applying. Candidates from computer science and IT backgrounds as well as economics, finance and statistics streams can apply for the relevant roles.

Educational Qualification

  • Technology roles (Cyber Security, AI, Quantum, Data Analytics): a postgraduate / technical / professional degree in Cyber Security, Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Quantum Computing, Physics or Electronics.
  • Economics & policy roles (Policy & Research, Credit Risk, Financial Markets): a Master’s degree or PhD in Economics, Econometrics, Statistics, Finance or Mathematics.
  • Engineering / data roles (Policy Analytics, Data Analytics & Policy Research): B.E., B.Tech, M.E. or M.Tech or a Master’s in Statistics, Computer Science or Data Science.
  • Payment system roles: a Postgraduate degree in Economics, Finance, Commerce, Public Policy or Data Science, OR B.E. / B.Tech, OR Chartered Accountant (CA).
  • Climate role: a Master’s / PG qualification in Climate Studies, Environmental Science, Sustainability, Economics or Finance.

Relevant work experience is desirable but not mandatory, so fresh postgraduates can also .

Age Limit

  • Minimum age: 21 years
  • Maximum age: 30 years (as on 6 July 2026)

What is the Salary & Stipend for RBI Young Professional 2026?

The pay for this role is simple and attractive. Instead of a regular pay scale, RBI gives a fixed consolidated stipend for the full duration of the engagement.

  • Monthly Stipend: ₹1,50,000 (consolidated)
  • Payment: paid every month, subject to applicable tax deduction (TDS)
  • Leave: 15 days leave per calendar year

Your approximate in-hand amount will be close to ₹1,50,000 per month, after standard tax deduction at source. No house rent allowance, dearness allowance or other perks are payable over and above this stipend.

Since this is a learning-focused contract role, the Bank does not provide residential accommodation. However, the exposure, brand value and experience of working at India’s central bank are priceless for your career.

What is the Selection Process for RBI Young Professional 2026?

There is no written examination for this engagement. Selection is done purely on the strength of your profile and interview. The steps are explained below.

  1. Preliminary Screening: A committee shortlists candidates based on eligibility and the details in your application.
  2. Document Verification: Your claims on age, qualification and experience are checked against original documents.
  3. Interview: Shortlisted candidates receive an interview call letter by email and appear before the selection panel.

Meeting the eligibility is necessary but does not guarantee an interview call, as the Bank may limit the number of candidates called.

How to for RBI Young Professional 2026?

The application is submitted by email using the prescribed proforma given in the . Keep your documents ready before you start. Follow these steps carefully.

title: OSSSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026: for 5,989 Posts, Salary up to ₹92,300
description: OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026 Notification: 5,989 Vacancies, Eligibility & Here is some wonderful news for nursing students of Odisha. The Odisha Sub-Ordinate Staff Selec
jobDescription:
OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026 Notification: 5,989 Vacancies, Eligibility &

Here is some wonderful news for nursing students of Odisha. The Odisha Sub-Ordinate Staff Selection Commission (OSSSC) has released a massive recruitment for 5,989 Nursing Officer posts across all 30 districts of the state. This is one of the biggest nursing recruitments in Odisha in recent years, so if you have completed your GNM or B.Sc Nursing, this is the moment you have been waiting for. The posts come with an attractive pay of ₹29,200 to ₹92,300 under Pay Matrix Level-8.

The online application process is open from 13 June 2026, and the last date to submit your form is 13 July 2026. This is a brilliant opportunity for government job seekers in Odisha to build a stable and respected career in healthcare. In this article we will explain the vacancies, eligibility, salary, selection process and the exact steps to . Read it fully so you do not miss anything, and keep handy for every update.

Key Highlights — OSSSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026

The Odisha Sub-Ordinate Staff Selection Commission conducts recruitment for various Group-B and Group-C posts in the state government. This time it is filling thousands of Nursing Officer posts in government hospitals and health centres. Selected candidates may also be deployed as Community Health Officers (CHO) by the appointing authority.

  • Post Name: Nursing Officer (District Cadre)
  • Total Vacancies: 5,989 posts
  • Salary / Pay Level: ₹29,200 – ₹92,300 (Pay Matrix Level-8, Group-C)
  • Job Location: Odisha (all 30 districts)
  • Application Start Date: 13 June 2026
  • Last Date to Apply: 13 July 2026

This is a great chance for every 12th pass and nursing diploma holder to enter government service.

Vacancy Breakdown — OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026

There are a total of 5,989 Nursing Officer posts spread across all 30 districts of Odisha as a district cadre. Within this total, some posts are horizontally reserved for special categories as shown below.

The full category-wise and district-wise reservation is given in the , so please check the PDF for your exact category position.

Eligibility Criteria — OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026

Please check both your education and age carefully before applying. Nursing candidates from the medical and healthcare field are eligible for this recruitment.

Educational Qualification

  • Passed +2 (10+2) or equivalent, AND
  • Diploma in GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery) OR B.Sc Nursing from an institution recognised by the Indian Nursing Council, AND
  • Valid registration with the Nursing Council as on the date of application.

Language Requirement

  • The candidate must be able to read, write and speak Odia and must meet the prescribed Odia language standard mentioned in the notification.

Age Limit

  • Minimum age: 21 years
  • Maximum age: 42 years (as on 12 June 2026)
  • Age relaxation: 5 years for SC, ST, SEBC and Women, and 10 years for Persons with Disabilities, as per Odisha government rules.

What is the Salary for OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026?

The Nursing Officer post offers a stable government pay structure under the 7th Pay Commission, Pay Matrix Level-8.

  • Pay Scale: ₹29,200 – ₹92,300
  • Starting Basic Pay: ₹29,200
  • Post Group: Group-C
  • Plus Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA) and other admissible allowances.

After adding DA, HRA and other allowances, the approximate in-hand salary is around ₹40,000 to ₹50,000 per month, depending on the place of posting.

Along with a good salary, you also get job security, medical benefits and the satisfaction of serving patients in your own state.

What is the Selection Process for OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026?

The selection is based on a written test followed by document verification and district allocation. The stages are explained below.

Written Examination

The written test carries 100 marks with 100 multiple-choice questions in 2 hours. The marks are divided as:

  1. Nursing subject / syllabus questions — 60 marks
  2. Practical skills — 25 marks
  3. Arithmetic (High School standard) — 10 marks
  4. English (High School standard) — 5 marks

There is negative marking of 0.25 mark for each wrong answer. The minimum qualifying marks are 30% for ST, SC, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen and Sportspersons, and 35% for all other categories.

Document Verification & District Allocation

Candidates are shortlisted in order of merit (about 1.25 times the vacancies) for document verification, after which districts are allotted on a merit-cum-choice basis. You can review the detailed exam syllabus and pattern before you start preparing.

How to for OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026?

The application is fully online through the OSSSC website. Keep your documents and a valid email and mobile number ready, then follow these steps.

  1. Visit the official OSSSC portal (link in Essential Links below) and read the instructions carefully.
  2. Complete the one-time Registration / Re-registration first.
  3. Log in and fill the online application form with correct details.
  4. Upload your scanned photograph and signature in the prescribed size.
  5. Choose your preferred districts (up to three) for the test centre.
  6. Pay the application fee online (if applicable).
  7. Submit the form and take a printout for your records.

OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026 Important Dates

Note down these dates so you complete every step on time.

OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026 Application Fee

The fee is low and is fully refundable for candidates who actually appear in the exam.

The fee must be paid online through net banking, debit/credit card or UPI. The ₹500 fee is refunded to candidates who attend the written test.

Essential Links — OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026

  • Page
  • for OSSSC Nursing Officer 2026
  • Visit OSSSC

With 5,989 posts on offer, this is a once-in-a-lifetime chance for nursing aspirants in Odisha. If you meet the eligibility, do not wait till the last moment — register early and submit your form before 13 July 2026. A secure government nursing career is now within your reach. Keep visiting for more Odisha government job updates and exam alerts.

title: NHSRCL Recruitment 2026: for 209 Deputy Engineer & Junior Engineer Posts (Absorption Basis
description: NHSRCL Engineer Recruitment 2026: 209 Vacancies, Eligibility & The National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) — the company building India’s first bullet tr
jobDescription:
NHSRCL Engineer Recruitment 2026: 209 Vacancies, Eligibility &

The National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) — the company building India’s first bullet train — has released a big recruitment for 209 engineering posts. The vacancies are for Deputy Engineer, Deputy Chief Controller, Junior Engineer, Controller, Train Manager and Station Manager roles across departments like Civil, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom, Rolling Stock, Operations and AFC. If you are an experienced railway or metro professional, this is a chance to be part of one of the most exciting infrastructure projects in the country.

Please read this important point first — this recruitment is on an absorption basis and is open only to serving employees of Indian Railways, Government Railways, Metro Railways or RRTS. It is not an open-market recruitment for freshers or the general public. The online application closes on 14 July 2026. In this guide for railway job aspirants, we will explain the posts, eligibility, salary, selection process and how to . Read it carefully and keep handy.

Key Highlights — NHSRCL Recruitment 2026

NHSRCL is a central Public Sector company executing the Mumbai–Ahmedabad High Speed Rail (bullet train) project. It is filling these posts to strengthen its operations and maintenance team with experienced professionals.

  • Post Names: Deputy Engineer, Deputy Chief Controller, Junior Engineer, Controller, Train Manager, Station Manager
  • Total Vacancies: 209 posts
  • Salary: ₹40,000 – ₹1,45,000 (IDA pay scales)
  • Recruitment Type: Absorption basis (serving railway/metro/RRTS employees only)
  • Maximum Age: 45 years
  • Last Date to Apply: 14 July 2026

This is a premium opportunity in the PSU and central government sector for the right candidates.

Vacancy Breakdown — NHSRCL Recruitment 2026

There are 209 posts in total, divided into two grades across vacancy notices 21/2026 to 32/2026.

These posts span departments such as Civil & Track, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom, Rolling Stock, Operations and Automatic Fare Collection (AFC). The post-wise break-up is given in the PDF.

Eligibility Criteria — NHSRCL Recruitment 2026

Please read the eligibility very carefully, because this recruitment has a special service condition.

Who Can Apply (Important)

This recruitment is on an absorption basis and is open only to serving regular or contractual employees of Indian Railways, Government-owned or operated Railways, Metro Railways and RRTS. Fresh candidates and general public are not eligible. If you are currently working in the operations and maintenance side of any of these organisations, you can apply for the post that matches your branch and experience, and continue your career on one of India’s most prestigious projects.

Educational Qualification

  • A 3-year Diploma in Engineering, OR a B.E. / B.Tech degree, in the relevant discipline — Civil, Electrical, Electronics, Electronics & Communication, Mechanical, Computer Science or Information Technology — from a recognised institute. A few posts also accept Instrumentation, Mechatronics or Electronics & Instrumentation, and the Operations, Train Manager and Station Manager posts are open to any engineering discipline. Candidates from engineering backgrounds should match their branch to the post.

Experience

  • Deputy Engineer / Deputy Chief Controller (NE-6): minimum 5 years of supervisory experience.
  • Junior Engineer / Controller / Train Manager (NE-4): minimum 3 years of relevant experience.
  • Experience and eligibility are reckoned as on 31 May 2026.

Age Limit

  • Maximum age: 45 years.

What is the Salary for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?

The posts carry attractive IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) pay scales for non-executive staff in a central PSU.

  • NE-6 grade (Deputy Engineer / Deputy Chief Controller): ₹46,000 – ₹1,45,000
  • NE-4 grade (Junior Engineer / Controller / Train Manager): ₹40,000 – ₹1,25,000

Along with the basic IDA pay, you also get HRA, Perks, Medical Benefits, EPF and Gratuity as per corporation rules, which significantly increase the total package.

Appointment is on absorption basis with a one-year probation, and the role offers the rare chance to work on India’s flagship high-speed rail project. Since NHSRCL is a central PSU working under the Ministry of Railways, the pay and benefits are competitive and come with the long-term stability of a government organisation, along with strong opportunities for career growth.

What is the Selection Process for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?

The selection method depends on the grade you apply for. The stages are explained below.

Deputy Engineer / Deputy Chief Controller (NE-6)

  1. Computer Based Test (CBT)
  2. Document Verification
  3. Interview
  4. Medical Examination

Junior Engineer / Controller / Train Manager (NE-4)

  1. Computer Based Test (CBT)
  2. Document Verification
  3. Medical Examination

There is no interview stage for the NE-4 grade. You can review general exam pattern and preparation guidance to get ready for the CBT.

How to for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?

The application is online through the NHSRCL career portal. Keep your documents ready and follow these steps.

  1. Visit the NHSRCL career / vacancy notice page (link in Essential Links below).
  2. Read the detailed “Guidelines to Apply” and select the correct vacancy notice number for your post.
  3. Fill the online application form with your personal, educational and service details.
  4. Upload your experience / competency certificate issued by your current employer.
  5. Pay the application fee online (if applicable).
  6. Submit the form before 14 July 2026. You can apply for only one post in each notification group.

NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Note these important dates so you do not miss the deadline.

NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

The fee is low and is fully waived for several categories.

The fee is paid online during the application (with a small transaction charge) and is non-refundable.

If you are a serving employee who meets the eligibility, do not wait — get your experience certificate ready and before 14 July 2026. title: SSC GD Final Answer Key & Marks 2025 Released! Check Your Score Now @ ssc.gov.in Recruitment 2026
description: A Decisive Moment for Lakhs of Aspirants The moment every SSC GD aspirant has been eagerly awaiting is finally here! The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has officially released th
jobDescription:
A Decisive Moment for Lakhs of Aspirants

The moment every SSC GD aspirant has been eagerly awaiting is finally here! The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has officially released the Final Answer Key and the Marks for the Computer Based Examination (CBE) for the recruitment of Constable (GD) in Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs), SSF, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles, and Sepoy in Narcotics Control Bureau Examination, 2025.

This is a monumental step in your journey towards wearing the prestigious uniform and serving the nation. The release of final marks brings clarity, ends the suspense, and paves the way for the next crucial stages of the selection process. For the lakhs of candidates who poured their heart and soul into their preparation, this is the time to assess their performance and strategize their next move. Let’s dive deep into what this announcement means for you and how you can access your results.

SSC GD Final Answer Key 2025: Your Wait is Over!

After declaring the results of the Computer Based Examination on June 17, 2025, the commission has now taken the next step by providing complete transparency. On June 26, 2025, the SSC uploaded the Final Answer Keys along with the candidates’ individual Question Paper(s) and Response Sheet(s).

What does this mean? It means you can now see the officially correct answers for every single question, compare them with the responses you marked in the exam, and understand exactly how your score was calculated. This Final Answer Key is the definitive version, prepared after carefully considering all the valid objections raised by candidates on the tentative key.

How to Check Your SSC GD Final Answer Key & Response Sheet

Follow these simple steps to download your final answer key and question paper. Remember to do this before the deadline!

  1. Click the Direct Link: The SSC has provided a dedicated portal for this. You don’t need to browse the entire website. Click here: SSC GD 2025 Final Answer Key Login
  2. Enter Your Credentials: On the login page, you will be prompted to enter your Roll Number and Password (as per your admission certificate).
  3. View and Download: Once logged in, you will be able to see your Question Paper, your marked responses, and the final correct answers.
  4. SAVE A PRINTOUT: This is extremely important. This facility is only available for a limited time. Download and take a printout of your response sheet and the final answer key for your records.

How to Check Your SSC GD Constable Marks 2025

Alongside the answer key, the commission has also uploaded the marks of all candidates. Here’s how you can check your hard-earned score:

  1. Visit the Official SSC Website: Go to the homepage of the Staff Selection Commission.
  2. Login to the Candidate Dashboard: On the top right corner of the website, you’ll find the login section. Enter your Registration ID and Password to access your dashboard.
  3. Navigate to Result/Marks: Once logged in, look for a tab or link labeled ‘Result / Marks’ and click on it.
  4. Select the Examination: From the dropdown menu, choose the examination name: “Constable (GD) in Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs), SSF, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles and Sepoy in Narcotics Control Bureau Examination, 2025”.
  5. View Your Scorecard: Your detailed marks, including your normalized score, will be displayed on the screen. Download and save a copy of this scorecard.

Important Dates & Deadlines: Don’t Miss Out!

Time is of the essence! The window to access these details is short. Mark these dates on your calendar.

Please Note: The commission has explicitly stated that the answer keys and scorecards will not be available after July 10, 2025. Do not wait until the last minute to avoid server traffic issues.

You can view the official announcement PDF here: Official SSC GD 2025 Marks & Answer Key Notice

What’s Next After Checking Your Score?

Seeing your score is just one part of the journey. The real question is, what comes next?

  • If You’ve Scored Well: Congratulations! If your marks are well above the expected cut-off, your immediate focus should shift to the next stage: the Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST). This stage is as crucial as the written exam and requires peak physical fitness. Start your preparation now! Begin your running practice, work on your stamina, and ensure you meet all the physical standards (height, chest) prescribed in the .
  • If You Didn’t Qualify: It’s natural to feel disappointed, but do not be disheartened. Failure is a stepping stone to success. Analyze your performance. Where did you go wrong? Which subjects need more work? Use this experience as a powerful lesson. The next government job opportunity is just around the corner. Pick yourself up, learn from your mistakes, and start preparing with renewed vigor. Your determination will eventually lead you to success.

Stay Updated: Join Our Community!

The world of competitive exams is dynamic, with updates and notifications released frequently. To ensure you never miss a crucial update again, from exam dates and results to job alerts and study materials, we invite you to join our active and supportive community. Get the fastest information delivered directly to you!

  • WhatsApp Channel (for SSC Exams):
  • WhatsApp Channel (for all Job Alerts):
  • Telegram Channel (for SSC Exams):
  • Telegram Channel (for all Job Alerts):

Your dream of serving the country is a noble one. This is a significant milestone in that journey. Check your scores, prepare for what’s next, and keep pushing forward with courage and determination. We wish you the very best for the upcoming stages!

title: ISRO SAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – Graduate, Technician & Trade Apprentices, Walk-in at Ahmedabad
description: ISRO’s Space Applications Centre Invites Apprentices in Ahmedabad Dreaming of working with ISRO ? Here is your chance to step inside one of India’s most famous space organisations
jobDescription:
ISRO’s Space Applications Centre Invites Apprentices in Ahmedabad

Dreaming of working with ISRO? Here is your chance to step inside one of India’s most famous space organisations. The Space Applications Centre (SAC-ISRO), Ahmedabad, under the Department of Space, has released Notice No. SAC: RMT: APP: 2026 for the engagement of Graduate, Technician and Trade Apprentices for a one-year training under the Apprentices Act, This is a paid apprenticeship with a good monthly stipend and the priceless experience of working at ISRO. If you are searching for government jobs in Gujarat, this opportunity is right in Ahmedabad.

The number of seats is limited, and selection is done on a first come, first serve basis through a walk-in process. The walk-in will be held from 20 June 2026 to 03 July 2026 (except Saturday, Sunday and holidays). Engineering graduates, diploma holders and ITI candidates can all apply in their respective trades. In this article, we explain every detail — eligibility, stipend, age limit, and exactly how to attend the walk-in.

Key Highlights — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

The Space Applications Centre is the centre of ISRO that designs and builds payloads and applications for India’s satellites. Training here adds huge value to your resume. Here are the quick highlights:

  • Recruiting Body: Space Applications Centre (SAC-ISRO), Ahmedabad
  • Apprentice Types: Graduate, Technician and Trade Apprentices
  • Total Seats: Limited (engagement as per organisation requirement)
  • Stipend: ₹10,560 to ₹12,300 per month
  • Training Period: One year
  • Walk-in Dates: 20 June 2026 to 03 July 2026

Candidates with an ITI background should also check more ITI government jobs regularly updated on

Vacancy Details and Stipend — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

Seats are offered across 16 post codes in three apprentice categories. Each category has its own stipend, as shown below. The number of seats is limited, so reaching the venue early on the walk-in day is an advantage.

Eligibility Criteria — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

Eligibility depends on which apprentice type you are applying for. Read your category carefully before attending the walk-in.

Educational Qualification

  • Graduate Apprentice: B.E., B.Tech., B.Arch., B.Com or B.Lib (or equivalent) in the relevant field with a minimum aggregate of 60% marks.
  • Technician Apprentice: Diploma in Engineering / Technology in the relevant field with first class from a recognised State Board of Technical Education.
  • Trade Apprentice: SSC / Matriculation (10th) and ITI (NTC/STC) in the relevant trade.

Graduate and Technician candidates must be from Maharashtra, Gujarat, Goa, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, or DNH & DD. Trade apprentices must hold an ITI from a recognised institute of Gujarat State. Only candidates who passed in or after July 2023 are eligible. Diploma holders can find more diploma government jobs on

Age Limit

  • Post codes 01 to 08 (Graduate/Technician): 18 to 28 years
  • Post codes 09 to 16 (Trade): 18 to 35 years

Age is counted as on the date of joining. Relaxation of 3 years for OBC (NCL) and 5 years for SC/ST candidates applies, with PwBD relaxation as per Government of India rules.

Stipend and Salary — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

The apprenticeship is fully paid, and the monthly stipend is fixed as follows: Graduate Apprentice – ₹12,300, Technician Apprentice – ₹10,900, and Trade Apprentice – ₹10,560 (COPA) or ₹11,040 (other trades). The stipend is paid every month for the full one-year training period.

While this is a training programme and not a permanent job, the real reward is the hands-on experience at ISRO and a recognised apprenticeship certificate that strengthens your career. Please note that apprentices have no claim for permanent employment at SAC or any other ISRO centre after the training ends.

Selection Process — How Candidates Will Be Chosen

The selection is very simple and is based on the first come, first serve principle. There is no written exam. Here is how it works:

  1. Eligible candidates register on the correct apprenticeship portal before attending.
  2. On the walk-in day, candidates reach the venue and enter their details in the attendance sheet to confirm their order of appearance.
  3. Documents are verified, and seats are filled in order of arrival until the limited seats are over.

Because seats are limited, arriving early really matters. Keep visiting for more such latest government job notifications with walk-in opportunities.

How to Apply for ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

The application is offline and in person at the SAC-ISRO venue. Email or postal applications are not accepted. Follow these steps:

  1. Register on the portal — NATS portal for Graduate and Technician apprentices, and the Apprenticeship India portal for Trade apprentices (links in Essential Links below).
  2. Fill in the attached application format given with the .
  3. Attend the walk-in at Building No. 30-D (Recruitment Section), SAC-ISRO, Jodhpur Tekra, Ahmedabad – 380015 between 10:00 AM and 1:00 PM.
  4. Submit your application in person and enter your details in the attendance sheet.

Documents Required for the Walk-in

Carry self-attested copies along with the originals of the following:

  • Aadhaar Card and PAN Card
  • Proof of date of birth and SSC (10th) mark-sheet & certificate
  • Mark-sheets & certificate of qualifying exam (Degree / Diploma / ITI)
  • Latest OBC (NCL FY 2026-27) / Caste / EWS / Disability certificate, if applicable
  • Local Police Verification cum Character Certificate and Blood Group report
  • SBI bank account details and recent passport-size photographs

Important Dates — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

Application Fees — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

There is no application fee for this apprenticeship. Candidates only need to register on the apprenticeship portal and attend the walk-in with their documents. This makes the opportunity completely free for all eligible candidates.

Essential Links — ISRO SAC Apprentice 2026

  • Download PDF
  • Register for Graduate / Technician Apprentices (NATS)
  • Register for Trade Apprentices (Apprenticeship India)
  • Visit SAC-ISRO Official Careers Website

Working at ISRO, even as an apprentice, is a proud moment and a strong start to your career. Register early, keep your documents ready, and reach the walk-in venue on time between 20 June and 03 July 2026. For more Gujarat government job updates and apprenticeship news, keep visiting . This could be the first step of your space career.

title: DRDO ARDE Pune Paid Internship 2026 – 40 Slots for Engineering Students, Stipend ₹5,000
description: DRDO ARDE Pune Invites Engineering Students for a Paid Internship Calling all engineering students who want real defence-research experience! The Armament Research and Development
jobDescription:
DRDO ARDE Pune Invites Engineering Students for a Paid Internship

Calling all engineering students who want real defence-research experience! The Armament Research and Development Establishment (ARDE), a premier laboratory of DRDO under the Ministry of Defence, has released Advertisement No. ARDE/HRD/PDINTERN/2026/01 for its Paid Internship Scheme for the year 2026-A total of 40 internship slots are open for under-graduate and post-graduate engineering students, with a monthly stipend of ₹5,000 for a six-month internship at ARDE, Pune. For students chasing defence sector government jobs, this is a brilliant head-start.

ARDE designs and develops advanced armament systems for the Indian Army, Navy and Air Force, so an internship here looks excellent on your resume. Students in the 7th/8th semester of UG engineering or the 1st/2nd year of PG engineering can . The last date for the application to reach ARDE Pune is 05 July 2026. In this guide, we explain the disciplines, eligibility, stipend and the offline apply process in very simple words.

Key Highlights — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

This is a paid, project-based internship at one of DRDO’s top armament laboratories. It is meant for bright, regular engineering students. Here are the key points:

  • Recruiting Body: ARDE (Armament Research & Development Establishment), DRDO
  • Programme: Paid Internship Scheme of DRDO (2026-27)
  • Total Slots: 40
  • Monthly Stipend: ₹5,000
  • Duration: 6 months
  • Last Date to Apply: 05 July 2026

If you are a final-year or post-graduate student, also explore more post graduate government jobs on

Vacancy Breakdown — ARDE Paid Internship 2026

The 40 slots are spread across several engineering branches. The numbers below are indicative and may change at the discretion of the establishment.

Eligibility Criteria — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

Read these conditions carefully, because the academic-score requirement is strict for this internship.

Educational Qualification

The applicant must be a regular student pursuing an Engineering Degree — B.E./B.Tech (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/2nd year) — full time in the relevant discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute. Only students from AICTE-approved technical institutions or UGC-approved universities are eligible. This is a focused opportunity for engineering students looking for government exposure.

Age Limit and Academic Score

  • Age: below 28 years as on 20 June 2026.
  • Academic record: 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA (on a scale of 10) or above, maintained continuously throughout all previous semesters.

Students who are already receiving any other stipend from any institute are not eligible for this internship.

Stipend and Salary — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

The internship pays a fixed monthly stipend of ₹5,000 for the entire six-month period. There is no application fee at any stage of the programme. Apart from the stipend, the biggest gain is the hands-on research experience at a DRDO armament laboratory and a completion certificate, both of which add real value to your career.

Please remember that this is a training internship, and it does not give any right to employment at ARDE or DRDO after completion. Students are also expected to submit a project report of the work done during the internship. For an engineering student who wants to build a career in defence research, this kind of exposure to live armament projects is something a classroom simply cannot offer, and it makes your resume stand out for future jobs and higher studies.

Selection Process — How Students Will Be Chosen

The selection is purely merit-based. Here is the simple flow:

  1. Applications are screened on the basis of academic merit (marks/CGPA).
  2. Shortlisted students are intimated through their email ID along with joining instructions.
  3. No communication is entertained from candidates who are not selected.

So a strong and consistent academic record is your biggest strength here. There is no written exam and no application fee, which means the whole process rewards your hard work in college rather than your ability to clear yet another test. Make sure your mark-sheets and CGPA proof are accurate and ready before you . Keep visiting for more defence government job and internship updates.

How to Apply for DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

The application is offline and must be sent by post/courier. Follow these steps:

  1. Fill the application in the required format (Appendix ‘A’) given with the and attach a recent passport-size photograph.
  2. Get a request letter / No Objection Certificate from the Principal/Director of your institute (Appendix ‘B’).
  3. Fill the Undertaking Form (Appendix ‘C’).
  4. Send all documents through Speed Post / Courier / Registered Post so that they reach ARDE, Pune.
  5. Make sure your application reaches on or before 05 July 2026.

Documents Required with the Application

Keep these ready before posting your application:

  • Duly filled application form (Appendix ‘A’) with photograph
  • Request letter / NOC from your institute (Appendix ‘B’)
  • Duly filled Undertaking Form (Appendix ‘C’)
  • Latest semester mark-sheets / CGPA proof
  • Student ID card copy

Important Dates — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

Application Fees — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

There is no application fee for this internship — not at the time of application, and not at any stage of the internship programme. Candidates only bear the postal cost of sending their application. This keeps the opportunity completely free for every eligible student.

Essential Links — DRDO ARDE Paid Internship 2026

  • Download PDF
  • Visit ARDE DRDO Official Internship Page

A paid internship at a DRDO armament laboratory is a rare and proud opportunity for any engineering student. Prepare your documents, get your NOC ready, and post your application early so it reaches by 05 July 2026. For more Maharashtra government job notifications and internship alerts, keep visiting . This could be the first step of your defence-research journey.

title: Cabinet Secretariat Senior Field Officer Recruitment 2026 – 25 Group A Posts, Apply Now
description: Cabinet Secretariat Opens 25 Group A Senior Field Officer Posts Through GATE Here is a golden chance for engineering and science graduates who have a valid GATE score and dream of
jobDescription:
Cabinet Secretariat Opens 25 Group A Senior Field Officer Posts Through GATE

Here is a golden chance for engineering and science graduates who have a valid GATE score and dream of a top central government job. The Cabinet Secretariat, Government of India has released Advertisement No. 01/2026 for the post of Senior Field Officer (Technical) — a Group A, Gazetted post in Level-10 of the Pay Matrix. A total of 25 posts are to be filled across five technical subjects, and the selection is based on your GATE score plus an interview, so there is no separate written exam to clear.

This is a direct recruitment for Indian nationals, and the monthly pay comes to around ₹1,30,000 (approximately) at New Delhi. The last date to submit your application is 12 July 2026. Because this is one of the most prestigious central government jobs available right now, competition will be strong but rewarding. In this guide, we explain the vacancies, eligibility, GATE requirement, and the offline application process in very simple words.

Key Highlights — Cabinet Secretariat Senior Field Officer 2026

The Cabinet Secretariat works directly under the Prime Minister and is one of the most important offices of the Government of India. A Group A post here gives you respect, excellent pay, and a strong career path. Here are the key points at a glance:

  • Recruiting Body: Cabinet Secretariat, Government of India
  • Post Name: Senior Field Officer (Technical)
  • Total Vacancies: 25 (across five subjects)
  • Pay Level: Level-10 in the Pay Matrix, Group A (Gazetted)
  • Selection Basis: Valid GATE score + Interview
  • Last Date to Apply: 12 July 2026

If you hold an engineering degree, you should also explore other engineering government jobs listed on

Vacancy Breakdown — Senior Field Officer (Technical) 2026

The 25 vacancies are divided subject-wise. You must apply for only one subject, and you need a valid GATE score in the corresponding GATE paper code shown below. These numbers are tentative and may be revised by the Cabinet Secretariat.

Eligibility Criteria — Cabinet Secretariat Senior Field Officer 2026

Please read this section very carefully, because both the degree and the GATE score are compulsory. Even a small mistake in eligibility can lead to rejection.

Educational Qualification

A candidate must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology OR a Master’s degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in the relevant subject. In addition, the candidate must have a valid GATE score of 50% or above (i.e., a GATE score of 500 or more) in the corresponding subject. A valid GATE score from GATE 2024, 2025 or 2026 is accepted. Candidates from a computer science and IT background have the most openings here, with 10 posts in the CS subject alone.

Age Limit

The candidate’s age should be not exceeding 35 years as on the closing date. Age relaxation is available for various categories (SC/ST/OBC, Ex-Servicemen, PwD, etc.) as per the standard orders of the Central Government. Make sure you calculate your age correctly as on the last date.

Salary and Pay — What a Senior Field Officer Earns

This is where the post becomes very attractive. The Senior Field Officer (Technical) is appointed in Level-10 of the Pay Matrix, which carries a basic pay band of ₹56,100 – ₹1,77,500. Including all allowances such as Dearness Allowance and House Rent Allowance, the monthly emoluments come to around ₹1,30,000 in case of posting at New Delhi.

Apart from the strong salary, you get the status of a Group A Gazetted Officer, government job security, pension benefits, and a respected role within the Cabinet Secretariat. For technically qualified candidates, this combination of pay and prestige is hard to find elsewhere.

Selection Process — How Candidates Will Be Chosen

The selection is simple to understand and rewards your GATE performance. Here is how it works:

  1. All valid applications are arranged in order of merit based on the GATE score, separately for each subject.
  2. Candidates equal to five times the number of vacancies in each subject are shortlisted and called for interview.
  3. Final selection is based on the GATE Score (maximum 100 marks) and the Interview (maximum 20 marks) together.

Because the GATE score carries the highest weight, a strong GATE result is your biggest advantage. You can brush up using the exam syllabus and preparation resources shared regularly on

How to Apply for Senior Field Officer (Technical) 2026

This recruitment uses an offline (postal) application. There is no online form, so follow these steps carefully:

  1. Type the application on A-4 size paper in English capital (block) letters using black or blue ink only.
  2. Fill in every column — do not leave any column blank, and attach a recent passport-size photograph.
  3. Attach self-attested copies of your certificates (Matriculation onwards), the valid GATE Score Card, and category certificate if applicable.
  4. Place the complete application in an envelope and send it through ordinary post to the Post Bag address mentioned in the .
  5. Make sure your application reaches on or before 12 July 2026 — late applications will not be accepted.

Documents Required with the Application

Keep self-attested copies of these documents ready before you post your application:

  • Mark-sheets and certificates of Matriculation, 10+2 and your Bachelor’s/Master’s degree
  • Proof of age (Matriculation certificate, Birth certificate, PAN card or Passport)
  • Valid GATE Score Card for the corresponding subject
  • Caste/Category certificate in the prescribed Central Government format, if applicable
  • Recent passport-size photographs

Important Dates — Cabinet Secretariat Recruitment 2026

Application Fees — Senior Field Officer (Technical) 2026

Good news for all candidates — the does not prescribe any application fee for this recruitment. You only need to bear the cost of sending your application by ordinary post. This makes the opportunity open to every eligible candidate without any money barrier.

Essential Links — Cabinet Secretariat Senior Field Officer 2026

  • Download PDF (Employment News Version)

A Group A central government post with no application fee and selection based mainly on your GATE score is a rare opportunity, so do not miss it. Prepare your documents, fill the form neatly, and post it well before 12 July 2026. For more such latest central government job notifications, keep visiting daily. Your hard work in GATE can finally land you a dream government job.
